Now let me sleep

And if you dare to send me another one of those unfunny meme. I'm blocking you fr this time.

▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎

Ishan woke up for the second time when he heard water running down somewhere.

He looked around to see shubman coming out of bathroom.

"Still throwing up?" Ishan asked looking at shubman who came to sit on bed holding his head by both of his hands.

"Yeah still feeling nauseous" shubman says looking up.

"I should be the one feeling nauseous after that kiss" ishan says.

"Ishh....did i make you feel uncomfortable yesterday?" Shubman asks slowly approaching ishan.

"No....but you kissed me with that nasty rotten tequila mouth of yours" ishan says giving shubman a judgy face.

"Are you sure i remember washing my mouth" shubman groans.

"Hush now, i don't wanna go back to that" ishan whines.

"Was it that bad? You were enjoying though" shubman says smirking. "Wanna go again i just brushed my teeths"

"That kiss was to make my confusion go away. Now it seems like you got confused with your sexuality??" Ishan says surprised.

"Well....it was a sight to see you being a moaning mess" shubman says teasing ishan.

"Ohh my god get away from me you nasty human being" ishan says giggling while running away from shubman.

"Atleast tell me if you're bisexual or not?" Shubman asks running behind him.

"Yes i am." Ishan replied.

"So my nasty kiss did work" shubman says finally catching ishan.

Ishan felt shubman pulling him closer by the waist, lips resting on his forehead before saying "just so you know, I'll always love you"

"I'll always love you too" ishan smiled resting his head against shubman's chest.

▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎

Thankfully everything between them was back to normal nothing really changed.

But maybe something has changed in shubman. He would catch shubman staring at him for longer. Never leaving his sight for any given minute.

Maybe it was just shubman trying to show more affection towards him now that he have came out, not trying to make him feel left out. Ishan reasoned with himself.

"Are you not liking it?" Virat asks noticing how ishan still hasn't touched his food, he's just slicing his noodles into tiny bits.

"No no it's good" ishan says.

"Stop it i cannot bare to watch it any longer" virat says holding ishan's hand to stop him.

"You seem lost. What's on your mind ishu?" Virat asks his voice getting gentle.

"Bhaiya...is it possible to kiss someone without feeling anything?" Ishan asks still deep in his own thoughts.

"Yeah actors do it all the time...I'm married to one if you remember" virat replied.

"No bhaiya i mean in real life. No acting not a job not a dare or anything" ishan asks looking down.

"Well it depends on the relationship you have with that person. Friendship or situationship? Wait who did you kiss?" Virat asks getting curious.

"It's not about me bhaiya i was just asking" ishan says panicking a bit.

"Yeah sure" virat replied mockingly.

"I'll get going now" ishan says getting up and leaving those noodles he cut into small pieces to get soggy.

▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎

It depends on relationship. And the situation as well yeah that's what virat said. Yet ishan have no idea what to make of it.

The truth is ishan got a secret.

A secret he never dared to act on nor to speak out loud to anyone other than mayank before but just like that all his hard work just crumbled.

All the years he spent hiding and holding back all gone in just one night, and now he had crossed the line where he knew that he could never afford to step back into again.

He cannot just forget that night like it didn't happen.

He cannot delete all those kisses from his memory.

He cannot pretend it was just a normal thing between him and his best friend.

He unlocked his phone to call mayank.

"Move on you said as if, it was that easy" ishan says when the call got answered.

"You have been trying to move on for years ishu" mayank says from other side sighing.

"It wasn't that hard before. He's making it harder now" ishan whines.

"Try distancing yourself might work?" Mayank says.

"What if things get awkward between us i don't want to lose my best friend" ishan asks bit hesitant.

"I'm not telling you to cut him off completely, take few steps and if you feel like losing him then go back yeah?" Maynak continues "spend some time with other people too you're with shubman 24/7 how will this help"

"Sounds like plan" ishan says.

"Yeah then work on it" Maynak says before ending the call.

Ishan is sitting thinking about what mayank said. Should he really work on that?

He fucked his already fucked up life.

Maybe he is pathetic. Why is he keep falling deeper and deeper. Before he would just steal glances at shubman's face but now he wants to steal kisses too.

Ishan sighs opening his Instagram to put an end to his overthinking.

His facial expression changed to unpleasant when he saw a "shub-sara" reel.

"Ahh fuck my life" he says throwing his phone onto the bed. Soon picking it up to see if the phone got damaged somewhere getting worried.

...........end for today...............

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

Missing bold shubman in ishan's comment section. 😔

Title: chapter 11
Chapter_Text:
The world cup was over.

But the troll it took on everyone's mental health wasn't over.

Don't overthink that's what everyone told him. Yet he's here doing the exact opposite.

Right now ishan is lying on his bed staring at the ceiling. Trying to empty his head. 'It could've been different if they let me play.' 'Would it be any better? Or worse perhaps?' 'Only if i had a chance to play i wouldn't be thinking all that now' but they've already lost now there's no point to think about what different could have happened.

He doesn't even know how the rest of the day went by. Everything around makes him overthinking.

Thankfully ishan got selected to play in 1st t20i match against Aus.

"Still thinking about it?" Shubman says coming back from balcony.

"You yourself isn't doing much better either" ishan huffed.

Shubman dropped beside him, pulling ishan in his arms.

"Let's just go to sleep" shubman says.

Ishan moved closer, shubman smells like his favorite perfume. Soothing, something about smelling his perfume on shubman calms ishan's disturbed mind.

"Good night shubi" ishan buries his face into shubman's neck inhaling deeply.

He smiled when he felt a soft kiss on his forehead.

▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎

It was probably around 7 in the morning when ishan woke up feeling someone running a finger on his chest.

"Should i get a tattoo too?" He heard shubman says.

Ishan finally opened his eyes to see shubman inspecting the tattoo on his chest.

"I think I'll get one on my chest too" shubman continues. "It'll probably hurt a lot right?"

"Can't believe you woke me up to ask about tattoos" ishan groans.

"I'm sorry but we need to get up early though" shubman says playfully ruffling ishan's hair.

"And why do we have to woke up early?" Ishan asks as he shoots a glare at shubman.

"That's the last day we have together do you wanna sleep it away?" Shubman asks acting surprised.

"Then what are the plans for today?" Ishan asks.

Against ishan's will he find himself sitting inside a car.

"We're here" shubman says as he parked the car in front of a shopping mall.

"Seriously shub shopping mall at 11 am" ishan says.

"The prefect time nobody will be there to spot us" shubman continues "say I'm a genius"

"Yes very genius of you to go out shopping the very next day after world cup" ishan says bluntly.

"Am i not allowed to shop now?" Shubman asks whining.

"Let's just go somewhere private" ishan continues "kapde to tune wese bhi mere hi churane hai"

"We already wasted 1 hour driving around" shubman says as the car came to stop for the second time. But this time it was in front of a arcade.

"Lead the way" ishan says as he unbuckled his seatbelt.

"You're really bad at this" shubman laughs at ishan while he try to win the hoops earrings from this claw machine filled with random stuff.

"That was your 8th try ish let's drop it now" shubman murmured.

"I really want those hoops" ishan pouts "and you're breaking my confidence"

"Let me try to get them" shubman says pushing ishan to the side.

After 10th try shubman also give up.

"It's the machine. It's not made for winning" shubman groans.

"God I'm so hungry let's just forget about those stupid hoops" ishan says getting up.

▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎

Ishan has a warm smile on his face as he watch shubman talk about random things with those bright eyes and dimples on his cheeks.

Shubman stops talking when they heard a ding on his phone. He picked his phone to check who it was.

Sara

Can't wait to see you tomorrow!!

Text me before departure.

Take care ❤

Shubman

Will do.

"Who are you texting" ishan asks getting curious when he sees shubman typing on his phone.

"Nothing important" shubman continues "so what was i saying?"

"Thor-" ishan got interrupt by shubman.

"Yess why does he have to give up on stormbreaker after getting mjolnir back?" Shubman says getting excited.

"I mean he could live with both?" Shubman says putting food into his mouth. "Why choose one when you can have both"

Ishan shakes his head "mjolnir is his first love! why would he need another one when mjolnir have everything he wants"

"Two is always better than one" shubman slams his hand on table lightly.

"It would be too hard to handle both. Why need more when one is enough" ishan slams both his heads on table too trying to prove his point.

The two of them did not reach the end to this argument. So they decided to end the whole topic.

▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎

Currently they are packing their bags.  Well mostly ishan is packing both of their bags shubman is just sitting on the sofa watching him.

"Pack that black shirt of yours for me" shubman says "that blue one too....oh and don't forget your perfume"

"You know what....here take my whole bag with you" ishan says pushing his bag towards shubman.

"Sounds good" shubman says happily taking the bag from ishan.

"You want me to go empty handed" ishan scoffs.

"Come here" shubman says pulling ishan to sit with him.

shubman takes ishan's hand putting something in his palm.

"Ohh my God, Shubi!" Ishan gasps realising it was the hoops he wanted earlier.

"When did you even win those" he questioned.

"I didn't. Got someone to open the claw machine" shubman replied smirking.

"And why didn't i saw you doing that" ishan questioned again.

"You were busy ordering food" shubman replied.

Shubman took the hoops from ishan's hand proceeding to put them in his ears taking off the earrings he was already wearing.

"Wait they'll get worn off soon if i wear them now" ishan continues "I'll keep them for special occasions only"

"Then i will buy you good quality ones if they get worn off." Shubman says making ishan wear those hoops.

"Good quality? Platinum with real diamonds?" Ishan asks getting excited.

Shubman rolled his eyes but ended up nodding and agreeing with him in the end.

▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎

"Everything packed?" Shubman asks.

"Yeah just one more walk around to check" ishan says walking around to see if something is left out of their bag.

The two of them are sitting at the airport. Ishan have his flight first.

"The boarding started for my flight" ishan got up on his feet holding his bag.

"Okay" shubman pulled him closer in a hug, he struggled not to melt into it, hold on tight and forget about his flight.

When they finally separated shubman fluffed his hair foundly looking at him. "Be safe. And text me when you get there, even if you think I'm sleeping or busy. I just feel better knowing you reached"

"Okay i will" ishan promised before snickering. Perhaps his heart flattered a little by shubman's words.

"Goodbye darling" shubman says.

"Don't flirt with me right now, it makes harder to leave you baby" ishan says whining.

"Sorry no flirting" shubman emphasises. But proceed to fly a kiss towards him as he walk to his boarding gate.

Ishan chuckled but that died down soon when shubman wasn't in his view anymore and he was alone.

Interesting how the second he can't see shubman, he feels overwhelming urge to cry.

He doesn't wanna leave today, he doesn't wanna take 5 hour long flight and then go to practice the very same day. He just want to lay down and sleep with shubman in his embrace.

............end for today.............

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

The hoops

Title: chapter 12
Chapter_Text:
Ishan is feeling grateful today. He got to play, scored a half century india won. Everyone is happy. What else can he ask for? Well he still haven't received a reply from shubman it's been a whole day.

Ishan

The match is about to startSent: 06:30 pm

Voice callNot answered 06:40 pm

Answer the call!Sent:06:41 pm

Are you busy?Sent:06:41 pm

Are you watching?Sent: 06:50 pm

We won!!Sent: 10:00 pm

Ishan throw his phone on bed after seeing still no reply from other side.

He was deep into his thoughts when he heard a knock on his door.

"Who's this?" He asks walking towards the door.

"There's a delivery for you sir" a man replied when ishan opened his door.

"Ohh what's that" he questioned again taking the huge box from delivery guy.

"I don't know sir i was just told to delivery it to you" the delivery guy replied.

"Okay then thank you" ishan says walking closing the door behind him.

He smiled as he open the box to find his favorite cake and more snacks in it. With a note 'you deserve it baby.'Just by looking at it he knew who sent it.

He picked up his phone after hearing a ding. Soon followed by a ring.

"Sorry" he hard shubman say from other side. "I got busy with stuff but i watched your highlights"

"Ohh you did?" Ishan asks smile appearing on his face unknowingly.

"Yess! You were looking so hot hitting those shots" shubman says in a flirtatious manner.

"Don't be soo cheeky that too after sending all these." ishan scoffs.

"Sent what?" Shubman asks confused.

"All those snacks and a whole ass cake" ishan whines.

"I didn't send anything.....don't eat any of those who knows what's in it!" Shubman shouts.

"You ate already didn't you?" Shubman sighs after not getting a response from ishan.

"Just a bit. the cake was looking delicious and i thought you sent it" ishan continues with a hint of panic in his voice "there was a note also 'you deserve it baby' who else would call me baby?"

"I would" the door opened ishan looked up to see tilak walking in.

"Wait don't eat that cake i have no idea who sent it" ishan stops tilak. Seeing how he was about to take a bite.

"Who do you think would send those after seeing you down all day?" Tilak says winking at him.

"Wait he send-" ishan heard shubman say.

"God it scared the shit out of me" ishan continues chuckling "next time tell me before sending anything"

"Then how it will be a surprise?" tilak joins ishan into laughter.

"I'm still here guys" shubman says trying to get their attention.

A coldness dragged at ishan's chest when he realised it wasn't shubman who sent those. He feels a little disillusioned with that fact.

"Oh....i forgot you were on line" ishan says.

"DID I JUST MAKE YOU FORGET ABOUT SHUBMAN GILL?" tikal shouts "a cake and you forgot about shubman"

"I might be sending you a cakes everyday from now on" tikal says grinning.

"You forgot me over a cake? That hurts not gonna lie" shubman says dramatically.

"You forgot about me whole day, do you see me complaining?" ishan says sounding bitter.

"I....um I'm sorry. I told you i got busy with s- stuff... if i ever do that next time I'll buy you two cakes if that makes you happy?" Shubman says.

"Well what about today? You want me to let it slide?" Ishan snarked.

"How can i make it up to you then?" Shubman swallowed.

"Figure it out yourself" ishan says ending the call.

"So all that feeling down since morning was because of him not responding to your text?" tilak speaks.

"You know what I'm gonna do with this cake now?" Ishan says looking at the cake then at tilak.

"Don't you dare!" Tikal shouts running for his life.

▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎

"No one can escape when there's a cake in my hand" ishan says smirking.

"You motherfucker i bought it for you to get it all over my body?" Tilak whines.

"You know we aren't allowed to eat too much of it. Had to have the most fun out of it" ishan said.

Ishan see his phone screen go bright.

Shubman

Let's watch a movie tonight?

Ishan

Sorry i already got plans with tilak.

Shubman

Are you seriously ditching me for him?

Ishan

Am i?

He asked me for a movie night fisrt

Goodnight sleep well.

"Wanna watch a movie tonight?" Ishan asks tilak. When he saw him coming out of bathroom.

"Sounds good. What are we watching?" tilak walks towards the sofa.

After deciding what to watch ishan took a picture of TV screen real quick posting it on his story mentioning tikal's account.

'What a petty behavior ishan kishan' he laughed at himself taking one last glance at his phone screen.

▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎

Ishan did not get a single hour of sleep last night to say the least. He had been overthinking again. He thinks about what mayank said to him about keeping some distance. Maybe he should work on that, look at him he even lost his sleep over something so small. He Keep checking his phone hoping for a text from certain someone.

When he finally sees one he's more pissed off then before.

Shubman

Good morning ishh

Did you sleep well?

Unfortunately that's all he can see from his notification window. He have to open the chat to read the rest. He looked at the notifications thinking if he should open the rest. He ended up opening the chat.

Shubman

Good morning ishh

Did you sleep well?

I'm sorry for not replying to your text yesterday

It will never happen again

Hope you had a good time with tikal :)

Ishan scoffs as he reads the last line. Feeling petty for himself and guilty for shubman. But that does not mean he have forgiven him. How dare he text him so casually like ishan will forget everything. Couldn't he be more thoughtful and send him a apology as big as his height? But no he just wants to guilt trip ishan.

..........end for today............

.

.

.

.

Any song recommendation that remind y'all of ishman? I need to make a playlist that screams "ishman" 😩

Title: chapter 13
Chapter_Text:
Shubman

Are you ignoring me??

You don't take this long to respond

Your is best friend missing you 😔

Ishan chuckled as he reads the last text. He's forgiven shubman but he's still stuck on that. 'Just a little push' he will eventually reply after an hour or so.

Ishan was going about his day normally. Or so he thought because from the back of his mind all he could think about it shubman.

"Ishu." he looked up to see surya calling his name. "Are you here with us?"

"Yeah!.." he undoubtedly nodded his head "sorry i was just zoned out for a bit" he says sheepishly looking away as soon as surya'd gaze snaps at him again.

"Then better zone back in and focus on the practice yeah?" Jaiswal speaks from behind.

Ishan hums in agreement. And ran to catch the ball.

▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎

He walked towards his room with tired feet. Taking small steps. He opened the door slowly.

Ishan sees a figure lying in his bed. He walked closer to see shubman staring at him with a grin on his face.

Oh. He's so used to sharing a room with shubman now that he's not here he's hallucinating.

His hands moved on his own to touch the side of shubman's face. A hallucination he can touch.

Ishan smirks before hitting shubman with the same hand that was touching his cheeks before. 'Ahh that felt good' ishan said to himself ready to hit again but got stopped by his hallucination.

"Wha..Are you crazy? Is this how you treat me after i traveled 4 hours just to see you" he heard shubman say.

Ishan almost fall back on his ass as he tried to ran away. No way it's getting real now.

"Stop lying" ishan shouts. Keeping his distance.

"Woah ishh you really have gone crazy" shubman says getting up and walking towards ishan.

Ishan felt two hand wrapping around him. Bringing him into a tight hug.

"Back to reality now?" Shubman asks.

"What are you doing here? Aren't you taking a break?? You're not even playing in upcoming matches-" ishan's mumbling was cut by a hit on his head.

"I'm here because i missed you." Shubman says hitting ishan's forehead with his index finger.

"What about your break?" Ishan asks confused.

"I can spend it however i want. And i want to spend it with you" shubman says grinning.

"Wait... are you for real?" Ishan questioned.

"Yes i still need to practice i will do that here with you and then we'll leave to South Africa together" shubman continues "sounds like a plan?"

"Yeah a nice plan" ishan says smiling as he snuggled more into shubman's neck.

He looked up to see shubman already looking at him with those eyes. That makes him feel all sorts of things in his stomach. Maybe the 'little more push' wasn't that bad of a idea after all.

"Am i forgiven now?" Shubman asks smiling ear to ear.

"I...wasn't that mad" ishan says not wanting to make a eyes contact. "Was about to reply to all your text"

"Then should i just take my unopened bag and leave?" Shubman groans.

"You were forgiven" ishan continues "but that does not imply that i don't appreciate you being here"

"Just say you love me and can't live without me" shubman teases.

"Perhaps i do love you too much" ishan sighs.

"I love you too much too" shubman replies.

"Let's watch that movie now" shubman says taking ishan to bed with him.

"You came here for that movie?" Ishan raised his eyebrows.

"I'm not letting that go" shubman chuckled.

▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎

Ishan does not remember when he stopped focusing on the movie playing in front of him.

He have been looking at shubman Who's only focused on watching the movie to the point there's a frown on his forehead.

How long have he been looking at shubman? 5 minutes? 10 minutes? He can't seem to remember the only thing he seem to remember is that he just wants to watch shubman's expression change.

"What are you looking at?" Shubman asks over his shoulder.

"I can look at whatever i want." Ishan says with confidence.

"You have been staring at me for so long" shubman whines "just say the movie isn't interesting we can watch something else"

"Okay okay I'll focus now" he chuckled "your facial expression seemed more interesting"

Ishan's gaze would stray away from the screen every couple of minutes even after getting caught.

▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎

"Peel me that orange" ishan says out of nowhere pointing at fruit basket sitting on the table.

"What? Orange? At this hour" shubman sounds confused.

"Yes i wanna eat it right now!" Ishan demands.

"Then peel it yourself and eat" shubman replied looking back at the screen.

"It gets under my nails i don't like that" ishan continues to whine "come one peel it for me."

Shubman sighs finally picking up the orange. Peeling it.

"You know it was a test and you failed the 1st half of it" ishan scoffs. "You won't be a great boyfriend"

"Says who?" Shubman sounds defensive.

"The internet! If you have peeled the orange when i asked first it would show your love and care" ishan says a bit loudly.

"From where i come.....feeding is the our love language" shubman says taking a piece from orange between his teeths and coming closer.

Despite how closely shubman is looking into ishan's wide eyes. Despite the fact his heart stops and starts up at a whole new speed regime. He can't seem to push himself back.

His eyes moved to the orange between shubman's lips. His hands slipping from his lap to shubman face and out for his hair. He moved closer, closer, closer until-

The sweet citrus taste hit Ishan's mouth as he take the bite into orange. He moved back. Shubman did too.

Then he stops. Stops thinking. Stops breathing. The world stops.

Ishan blinked away the shock finally looking at shubman.

"Sweet, right?" Shubman says as if what they just did was the most normal thing in the world.

"Yeah" Ishan tried to laugh his shyness away.

.............end for today...........

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

Author's note:

Thank you everyone who recommended the songs i added them into a playlist.♡♡

Tell me if there's more songs that reminds you of ishman i would appreciate it so much.

I was not very much into Bollywood for the longest time. I'm just getting back into Bollywood songs after so long. So it helps a lot....♡

Title: chapter 14
Chapter_Text:
Ishan wakes up with a startle.

It's scary how the first thing he remembers after waking up are yesterday's memories.

As if he only slept in order to make himself calm and collected. Preparing himself to act unaffected by the events which had unfolded last night. When in reality his mind have been going back to that moment over and over again.

Ishan sits up in bed. Last night did he really nearly kiss shubman? Sober? Is he making a big deal? Is it totally normal thing?

"Why are you up so early" shubman speaks getting up.

Ishan startled for the second time today.

"Wtf bro stop scaring me" yeah back to bro.

But then he sees him.

He sees shubman curious faced and rounded pouty lips. Hair a sleepy mess Looking like a mare baby.

"There" ishan says lying down back to his place "now stop with the pout"

"I wasn't pouting" shubman huffs.

The pout came back when ishan tries to get out of bed forcefully. "What it is now"

"Just lay down for a bit" shubman says pulling ishan right back. Securing his arms around him this time.

Ishan allows himself to be pulled closer and closer until his back is pressed against shubman's chest.

▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎

Ishan wakes up to someone making loud noises to get him up.

"Get up both of you" the voice gets louder "what's shub doing here?"

Shubman tries to open his eyes slowly at the mention of his name. Trying to get use to sudden bright lights.

Tilak is standing over their bed giving them death glares.

"Not you again" shubman groans "i don't want to start my day with your face"

"With whom?" Ishan asks eyes still closed.

"Ishh!" Shubman shakes ishan up "look at me! Only me! I won't let you have a bad day by looking at him fisrt thing in the morning"

"Woah the amount of inferiority complex you got there motherfucker" tilak speaks mumbling the last part.

Shubman did not let ishan look at tilak for good two minute. He kept holding his face right in front of his not letting him move.

Tilak just stands there. Not wanting to disturb whatever they're doing. But kept judging them.

"Why are you here?" Shubman asks  finally looking at tilak.

"I came to wake ishan up." Tilak continued "Why are YOU here?"

"I...just wants to practice more here" shubman replied.

"Alright. Surya bhaiya said be at breakfast by 8:30" tilak says walking off. "And for the love of god put on a shirt shubman" tilak says after reaching the door.

The room's quiet. Ishan gulps before saying "let's get ready"

"Have you seen my brown tshir?" Ishan questions while getting into his black jeans.

"Yeah it's in my bag" shubman says walking towards his bag to take it out.

"Found it" shubman says. Ishan looked back expecting shubman with his brown tshirt in hand.

Shubman had a small box in his hands he came to ishan making him sit on bed.

Shubman placed the small box in ishan's hand. He opened the box to a silver sets of hoops identical to the ones he's already wearing. But anyone with eyes could tell the ones ishan's holding right now cost a lot more than the cheap ones he's wearing.

"Got them made in a week" shubman says proudly, taking off the hoops ishan's wearing.

Shubman smiles gently as he put the new hoops in ishan's ear one by one. His fingers gently creasing the right ear.

Ishan feels the sensation, the warmth that seeps through him and rushes through his veins. Oddly relaxing and exciting at the same time.

"Better now. Just looking like a wow" shubman coos.

"Stop with this meme. It's so overused now!" Ishan yells.

"Yeah it is very annoying" shubman scrunched his nose.

Ishan looks at shubman. Stares in the eyes. Looks at him as if he's memorising each and every detail.

Shubman comes closer, and instinctively ishan leans in to place a peck on his left cheek.

Ishan backed a bit after a second or two. And in that moment he decided to voice his thoughts.

"Thank you so much shubi" he whispers.

Shubman nodes at him before giving a smile. That big dimple smile ishan adores.

▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎▪︎

Shubman locks the door. Ishan was ready to walk off first when shubman immediately reached out for one of his hand and intertwined their fingers.

"Let's face them together" shubman says.

"You sound like we're hiding something" ishan chuckles at him. But his cheeks are still dusted pink.

Once they're seated at the table they're hit by glares from everyone.

"Wow the whole team is here what a surprise" shubman says nervously.

"Yeah what a sudden surprise to us also" Jaiswal huffs.

"What are you doing here shubman?" Surya questioned.

"Well- the SA tour is coming up...so i thought i could practice with the team" shubman replied.

"Yeah I'm sure that's the only reason" tilak speaks earning a glare from shubman.

"What?" Tikal smirks looking right back.

"And if i just punch that smirk off I'm the bad guy" shubman whispers to himself huffing.

"What did you say?" Ishan asks.

"Nothing...yeah that's the only reason i came here tilak" shubman scoffs.

Tilak let's out a dramatic grasp "see i told you" he looks at ishan.

"Don't believe him. That's not the only reason he's here" ishan says with a proud look on his face, as he places a tenderly hand on shubman's thigh under the table.

"You just wants to show off about me coming here for you don't you?" Shubman placed his hand over ishan's hand, cheeks turning red. The rest of the table erupts into forced coughs and laughter.

"It doesn't matter though. You're still here for practice too" ishan groans.

"Yeah if walking hand in hand on field count as practice. SURE" tilak throws sarcasm.

"You would have a plate thrown at you someday if keep acting this brave tilak" surya speaks.

"Are they always this lovey-dovey" Jaiswal asks looking at how ishan was demanding shubman to feed him the last piece of apple.

"You haven't seen the cringy part yet my brother" tilak continues "speaking from my personal experience"

"That explains your saltiness then" Jaiswal laughs.

..........end for today..........

.

.

.

.

.

*Ahem-Ahem...* the practice.

Author's note:

I deeply apologize for not updating for so long. I got busy with a wedding function.

*reference to pervious chapter"i was having a tangerine and let me tell you. Peeling tangerine/orange is the most annoying thing i would never do that for anyone atleast shubman did peel it after ishan asked him for the second time ☝️🤓

Title: chapter 15
Chapter_Text:
Shubman push opened the door to their room groaning. Surya bhaiya made them do 2 hours of extra practice.

A very tired ishan walked in behind him. "Lock the door ishh you always forget to do that and then we have people popping in our room out of nowhere." Shubman sighs.

"You do that I'm not getting up now" ishan says dropping on bed.

"You're getting so bratty nowadays" shubman complains, collapsing right beside ishan.

"Go take a shower and lock the door" ishan says pushing him away.

"You need to take a shower too" shubman says pulling ishan towards himself.

"Okay I'm gonna go take a shower you go lock the door and take some clothes out for me" ishan whines.

"Who do you think i am? Your housewife?" Shubman says lifting his brows.

"Yeah right! that's what you are" ishan continues as he tugged Imaginary hair behind shubman's ear "what's for dinner honey?"

"Nothing you're gonna starve to death my love" shubman chuckled "that's what you get after marrying me"

"Huh looks like we need to get a divorce" ishan groans.

"You'll be losing a hot tall and super handsome wife" shubman says "think again"

"Hmm..now that i think again it would be a big loss" ishan says lying on his side, propping his head over his arm as he stares at shubman beside him.

"So no divorce now?" Shubman pouts.

"You seem disappointed. Do you want a divorce shubman gill?" Ishan questioned.

"I was planning my single just divorced bitch era" shubman signed.

"You just wants to make me look like a bad husband who divorced you over dinner" ishan scoffs.

"Well it was you who had a extra marital affair with siraj bhaiya" shubman says in his own favor.

"Guess we're even now darling" ishan says nuzzling his face against the crook of shubman's neck smiling.

"God you're stinky" ishan says after seconds. Pushing shubman away.

"No shit sherlock, you're stinky too. We been practicing since morning" shubman say coming back towards him.

"Can you give your tired husband a bath darling?" ishan asks looking hopeful.

"Okay I'm filing for the divorce" shubman says getting out of bed.

........☆☆☆.......

Ishan sighs finally getting out of bathroom to lay in his comfort after a long day.

"Why are you always on my side" ishan whispers as he nudges shubman to his side.

"Your side is more comfortable" shubman replies.

"We change hotels room and bed every week" ishan asks giggling.

"You won't understand" shubman whines.

"Come here now, I'm not stinky anymore" shubman commands.

Ishan finds himself with an armful of shubman. Who got his nose pushed against his neck mumbling how good he smells.

"Y-Yeah i just showered" he agrees weakly trying to excuse his nervousness away.

Shubman responds with a devilish smile, wringing forward right back at the crook of his neck.

Shubman is too damn close ishan can feel the hot breath hitting his neck slowly getting closer and closer. Ishan almost flinched when he felt shubman's lips brush against his neck.

'Okay maybe he got little too close by mistake' ishan tries to calm himself.

The lips comes in contact with ishan's  neck for the second time. This time he's sure it's a kiss.

'It's no big deal right?? They kiss each other's whole face too what if it's the neck this time' his mind is going all over the place.

For the third kiss ishan felt it lasted longer than previous ones. "T-That..felt nice" ishan says, softly creasing the back of shubman's hair.

"Did it?....should i do more" shubman says as his hands travel to ishan's waist pulling him closer like if it was even possible.

"Huh?" ishan squeaks, brain short-circuiting did he just admitted that he likes it out loud.

Ishan is going to fucking die, because shubman is back to placing small kisses.

Then shubman goes to open his mouth. Ishan doesn't even need to think about it as shubman is sucking onto his neck. Licking into it.

That is it. Ishan is gone, he's too far gone for shubman, he can't even bring himself to try and resist to whatever shubman is trying to do.

Ishan doesn't understand what's going on. Hell he's not even sure if that's real or just a vivid dream.

But if this is only a dream he might as well let himself enjoy it. He rocked his head back to give more access to shubman. Hand moving to back of shubman's head other hand sits on one his shoulder.

It seems like the perfect opportunity for shubman to set his teeth slightly into the smooth neck skin that smells like heaven, so he follows his instincts, flicking his toung over the skin before biting down hard this time.

Ishan lets out a deep moan. Before shubman can continue to make ishan make more sounds like that. The door to their room opened. With Jaiswal walking in.

"I told you to lock the door" shubman looks up at ishan with betrayed eyes.

"Sorry...i- surya bhaiya....dinner" Jaiswal was too stunned to speak after what he just witnessed.

"Well i was having my dinner-" shubman mumbled to himself.

"Did surya bhaiya called us?" Ishan tried to make things less awkward.

"Yeah he told tilak to call you two, but he said he's too fed up with shubman and begged me to call you two" Jaiswal explains himself like he's the one who got caught doing something he's not supposed to do.

"Alright we'll be there in 10 minutes" shubman says getting up.

Ishan is looking anywhere but at shubman after they're left alone in their room.

"Sorry i got carried away and bit you" shubman says coming towards him with a ice cube wrapped in handkerchief.

"Let me see" shubman gently moved ishan's face to the side. Placing the the ice cube on that red mark he left on ishan's neck. "Does it hurt?"

Ishan hisses as the ice comes in contact. "It wasn't hurting before but now it sure is hurting"

"It's not that bad stop whining" shubman says putting the ice on his neck again.

"Yeah let me bite your neck, then we'll talk if it hurts or not" ishan replied.

"You're so kinky baby" shubman chokes at the blunt reply.

"You're the one to talk" ishan rolled his eyes.

...........☆☆☆.........

"Is there a group" Jaiswal asks tilak as they're sitting alone drinking "something like 'we hate ishman' group?" He continues.

Title: chapter 16
Chapter_Text:
"Wake up shubi the coffee is turning cold" ishan yells for the nth time trying to wake shubman up.

"Fine I'm eating alone then!" He snaps after seeing no movement at all.

Ishan turned to walk towards the table he had put the breakfast on that he ordered from room service. He took one last look at shubman who's still sleeping.

He took out a plate for himself taking a butter tost in it. A sigh left his lips as he have to eat alone. He looked around after taking a bite. The food doesn't taste good or his appetite died.

Ishan got up with his coffee to walk towards the balcony, he'll just enjoy his coffee with some fresh air.

"There you are!" Shubman let out a dramatic sigh walking behind him.

Arms circled around ishan's waist and shubman nuzzled closer, standing behind him with his body pressed against him.

"Good morning baby" shubman whispered against ishan's ear in his sleepy voice.

Ishan's grip on coffee mug tightened. He gulp down the sip he had taken just before, words lost in his throat as he felt the way shubman's nose rubbed against his ear for attention.

"Let's go eat" shubman said.

"I ate already" ishan looked away trying not to stare at those pouty lips for long.

Shubman frowned as he took away the coffee mug ishan was holding running inside with it then coming back empty handed.

"What-" ishan cursed out loud when he was lifted off the ground.

"Shubman!" He hold onto shubman's neck for support "i told you I'm done eating"

"Then sit and watch me eat" shubman said taking him over the table where he placed himself with ishan still in his arms.

"Feed me?" Shubman asks not wanting to let ishan go.

Ishan looked away taking a plate out for shubman "God stop abusing your power! I will break my bone someday if you drop me"

Shubman doesn't say anything instead he opens his mouth when ishan's hand come to feed him.

...........☆☆☆.........

Ishan got the news of him dropping from playing XI form the 4th odi match through a text. He was looking at the updated playing player's list.

"What are you looking at" shubman asks seeing how ishan's face fall after seeing whatever he's looking at.

"They dropped me from playing XI again." Ishan sighs "tikal got dropped too"

"Are you serious? This can't be" shubman says taking ishan's phone out of his hand to look.

It would be a total lie if ishan says he doesn't feel betrayed by the management.

"It was bound to happen after sheryas bhaiya return" ishan says his shoulder dropped.

"Let's hope you're playing for SA tour" shubman says hugging him.

Ishan remains silent. Hope is a terrible thing but he hope he's in playing XI for SA tour. There's a part inside him which is tired of getting his hopes crushed, tired of getting suppressed over and over again.

...........☆☆☆........

"Separate the dirty clothes don't just throw them all in" ishan yells when he sees shubman just throwing everything in his bag.

"Seriously shub!" Ishan huffed. "You can't just throw everything in and close it"

"Move!" Ishan says emptying shubman's bag then folding clothes one by one.

"On this side you put all the dirty clothes" ishan teaches shubman as he pack his bag "on this side all the washed clothes and important things goes into your handbag"

"I will pack you in my handbag if i can" shubman grins "you're the most important thing"

"Now that i think again your tiny body might fit in that handbag" ishan grasped when he hoisted him up twirled around laughing.

Ishan looked down when shubman held him up with his arms around ishan's hips.

"One more joke about my height and I'm cutting all your extra inches until you're shorter than me!" Ishan hit shubman's shoulders.

"Now put me down i need to do the packing" ishan whines.

Shubman was still grinning up at him. Slowly putting him down on the floor, he didn't let ishan go completely. Arms still around his waist eyes gazing over his face with a gentle smile.

"Let's go shopping once we're in Cape town" shubman says enthusiasm evident in his voice.

"It's been a while since we went shopping" ishan turned away getting out of shubman's hold.

........☆☆☆......

"I'm sitting on window seat!" Ishan whisper shouts at shubman.

"Well it's my seat, and you're not sitting on it" shubman fight back.

"You know how much i love to see the clouds!" Ishan can't help but mutter to himself "competitive bitch."

"It's a night journey ishan" shubman is speechless.

"I wanna see the night lights" ishan says suddenly forgetting about the clouds.

"You know what fine, I'll just sit next to-" ishan looked around to see Who's sitting next to other window seats "I'll sit next to Shreyas bhaiya he won't mind changing"

"Fine a 20 minutes neck massage after the flight and I'll let you sit" shubman says giving in. Holding ishan back.

"10 minutes and we have a deal" ishan ran to sit on shubman's seat even before he could seal the deal.

Shubman walked towards hotel elevator with a jet lagged ishan sticking onto his back like a monkey.

Shubman had to give piggyback to ishan after he started whining about his fatigue, he's not getting that neck massage today he knows that much. He shakes his head in disappointment.

"Alrighty get off now let me unlock the room." Shubman says bending down a bit.

"No" ishan enunciates, not letting shubman go squeezing him harder.

"What do you mean no? Get off" shubman says trying to get ishan off.

"I'll only get off when there's a bed next to me" ishan whines.

Shubman sighs giving up as he try to open the door with one hand.

"Here's the bed now would you get off my lord?" Shubman says shaking ishan a bit.

Ishan jumps onto the bed with shubman still in his hold.

"What are you doing ishh" shubman chuckled as he shifts to make the position more comfortable, he slips his arm beneath ishan head, subtly pulls him closer so that he can rest his chin on his head.

"A quick nap doesn't sound like a bad idea" shubman says closings his eyes.

"Mm" ishan hums, shubman freeze at the fact that it suspiciously sounds like a moan.

Shubman takes a moment before grabbing ishan's thigh pulling him closer shamelessly hand never leaving from there.

........☆☆☆........

Title: chapter 17
Chapter_Text:
"It's past 7 already don't you think we should start getting ready now" shubman asks without looking away from his phone screen.

"Then we'll be reaching on time" ishan rolled on bed whining "do you want to be on time?"

"Nahh" shubman shakes his head.

"Siraj bhai left a text in gc telling not to be late specifically you and me" ishan laughed.

.

.

"I have nothing to wear" ishan murmured to himself walking towards the bathroom.

"We literally went shopping yesterday" shubman deadpanned.

Ishan wore a oversized dior beige silk twill shirt paired with dusty brown colored pants and the pearl necklace shubman got him yesterday.

Shubman kept his attire casual yet hot. He had worn a black velvet shirt, it contrasted against his honey skin, the first three buttons kept undone to show his necklace paired with black jeans.

Ishan had his eyes settled on shubman for god knows how long, "let's go we will be late" he shrugged finally looking away from shubman.

"Like you ever cared about being late" shubman huffed.

They reached lobby in no time where most of the team members were waiting for them.

"I even left a text for you two to not be late" siraj sighs getting up.

"We had this night planned even before our flight landed how can you two be late" kl says sounding disappointed.

"A club night without hardik bhai...wasn't feeling it" ishan said.

"You and your hardik bhai" kl shakes his head.

.

.

"Let's get some drinks first"  ishan says walking towards the bar with shubman and Shreyas following him behind.

"What do you want?" Ishan asked after ordering his drink. "I swear to god if you say tequila-"

"Any cocktail..." shubman replies looking around. "You what don't- i don't feel like drinking...I'll be right back" and with that he walked away.

Ishan noticed how his eyes seems focused on something or rather someone.

.

.

"Woah shubman is going all In" siraj says looking at the dance floor.

"Bet he's trying to get laid tonight" bumrah joins in trying to bet.

"60,000 if he leaves with her" bumrah puts his glass down.

"Alright 60,000 if he leaves on ishan's shoulder after too many drinks" siraj brings his hand in front to shake and bet. "Just so you know i never lose when it comes to them"

..........☆☆☆.........

Ishan scowls at the scene in front of him barely noticing what song is being played he didn't even notice when shreya's left for washroom.

Eyes focused on shubman who have a girl pressed against him with his hands on her hips, While she have her hands draped over his neck.

Ishan's eyes moved to the girl she doesn't look indian rather European, she got her makeup on her hair looks soft neatly styled, the red bodycon dress is making her curves stand out more showing her gorgeous body.

Ishan wants to be a hater but there's nothing to hate on she's effortlessly beautiful.

He took a big sip of his drink while still glaring at the pair in front of him. Shubman leans in to say something in her ear that makes her laugh and press even closer. He gulp down another drink in the vague hope that it'll make easier to watch.

"Planning to get drunk today" ishan turned to see after hearing someone say that.

"I'm only at my third drink bhaiya" ishan replies to virat automatically.

"You already seem high" virat chuckles.

His eyes moved back to shubman he chockes on his drink when he saw the girl placing a kiss on the corners of shubman's lips, he scowls turning abruptly to face the bar with virat.

"Okay you are definitely too drunk ishu" virat sounds concerned. "Want me to call a driver?"

Suddenly air feels too thick his eyes moves back to dance floor. He takes a deep breath he wish he was brave enough to not get effected by any of this. It might be a coward way out but ishan rather spend rest of the night in their hotel room then staying here and risk seeing shubman do anything else with that girl.

"Please do" he replied to virat.

.

.

"Ishan left alone without any drunk shubman on his shoulder looks like you lost today miyaaa" bumrah says smirking.

"Hand me the money" bumrah says as they watch ishan leaving the club alone.

"Well shubman didn't leave with the girl either" siraj huffs.

"Didn't leave with her YET" bumrah teased.

"Yeah a big yet-" siraj didn't complete his sentence when he saw shubman walking towards them.

"Bhaiya do any of you know where ishan is?" Shubman asks.

"yeah he just lef-" bumrah was cut off by siraj.

"Yeah saw him have drinks with a guy at bar then they left i think 5-10 minutes ago" siraj says with a straight face.

"Ohh." Shubman sighs taking his phone out.

"No don't call him he said he wanted no distractions" siraj says grinning.

"Did he?" Shubman questioned putting his phone back into his pocket. "Then I'll go grab some drinks" with that he left.

"Why did you lie? And what guy did he had drinks with?" Bumrah questioned siraj with wide eyes.

"Isn't chiku bhai a guy where did i lie?" Siraj explains.

"I don't even wanna argue with you" bumrah sighs.

.........☆☆☆.......

Ishan had thrown up twice since he reached the hotel. Thankfully he doesn't feel the urge to throw up anymore. He went back to the bed afterwashing his mouth.

He's trying his best not to imagine things scrolling on his phone trying to divert his mind.

The door swing opens when he least expected someone to come. he almost screams until he heard a familiar voice call out his name.

"Ishaaaan babyyy"

How the fuck did shubman get here, and why he's here....it's his room too but did he came back for him?

"Found you" shubman sighs dropping next to him "why did you left without me ishh?"

"Was not feeling well" ishan mutters, trying to get away.

"Virat bhai told me...you left the club alone without even informing me" Shubman questions holding his hand. "Is there something bothering you?"

"Nothing is bothering me i was just not feeling well" ishan tries to manoeuvre his hand.

Title: chapter 18
Chapter_Text:
Shubman is awake for an hour now affectionately watching over ishan as he sleeps nestled against his side. He leans over ishan as he traces the mole on his Adam's apple then the bite marks.

The alarm goes off making shubman fall over ishan by the sudden shock. He tries to get up hurriedly.

"Are you trying to kill me by suffocatingme in my sleep??" Ishan's eyelids flutter "you know you're heavy right" he pushes shubman off.

"My first plan was to wake you up by kisses after ordering breakfast, but that damn alarm ruined it" shubman huffs.

"It was an attempted murder i almost died stop blaming it on alarm" ishan sighs dramatically.

"It was an accident" shubman defends himself.

"I'm pressing criminal charges" ishan says not caring about shubman's excuse.

"Didn't you say i was your thor yesterday, how can you put your hero in jail?" Shubman protests.

"Well that was yesterday, you in that black shirt walking around looking like thor with that big ass hammer" ishan continues. "But right now you look like..."

"W-what do i look like now?" Shubman whispers.

"Broke Peter parker, tom Holland one" ishan chuckles.

"I guess not too bad when I'm the Indian Spiderman" shubman grins. He leans in trying to steal a kiss. But got held back by ishan's palm on his lips. "Why?" He muffles.

"Uh-uh I'm not letting you anywhere near me until you brush your teeths" ishan declares.

Shubman groans as he walks towards the bathroom stomping like a child.

After 3 minutes he comes out of the bathroom running.

"I brushed my teeths now" shubman says jumping over ishan.

"Good morning baby" he softly whispers, placing a gentle pack over ishan's lips, feeling proud of himself after finally stealing a kiss.

..........☆☆☆........

They made their way to have breakfast with the team ishan wore a tight neck tshirt. And he made shubman wore a button up shirt with only one button undone.

"Woah my children finally learn to be on time" jadeja fake cried dramatically.

"All thanks to me jaddu bhai" ishan smiles taking his seat.

"Yeah all thanks to you, you decided to get ready on time" shubman rolled his eyes.

"Heard you left early last night ishu?" Rohit questions.

"Yeah i got drunk then i wasn't feeling g-good" ishan tries to sound confident.

"And you shubman why did you left early" rohit asks now looking at shubman's direction.

"Well i-" before shubman could strat he was cut off by siraj.

"He ran off to the hotel after knowing ishan had left and he obviously can't breathe without a certain concentration of ishan particles in the air." Siraj scoffs.

Shubman just looked at him with his mouth wide open.

"The clothes are too closed up for a hot day" Jaiswal comments.

"Are ye dono mil kar raat ko wo karete hai" rohit says busy cutting into his waffles.

Ishan spits out the juice that he had just taken a sip of "k-kya karte hai?"

"Wo karte ho na kapde nikal kar" rohit continues.

"Bhaiya what are you saying" shubman asks deadpanned.

"Are yaar raat me hi kapde nikal kar decided kar lete ho na kal kya pehen na hai" rohit explains.

Ishan started coughing after having to spit his juice out.

"Did you catch a cold ishu?" Shreyas asks sounding concerned.

"Are in dono ka wo chal raha hai" Rohit joins in.

"What?? Chakkar?? Romance?? Fling?? Situationship?? Love affair??" Virat stops to think about more words.

"Are nhi chiku AC, inka AC chal raha h raat bhar cold to hoga hi na" rohit says as if everyone is too dumb to understand what he meant.

"Bhaiya puri baat bola karo yaar" shubman cries.

...........☆☆☆.........

It was around 4 PM when they returned from their practice.

Ishan combs his wet hair after taking a shower, shubman come to hold him from behind kissing the side of his neck and speaks, "let's have dinner out tonight"

"Yeah where?" Ishan asks.

"Somewhere nice" shubman says burying his nose into his neck. "God you always smells so good"

Surprisingly ishan got ready first while shubman still taking a shower.

He got on his phone to check up on mayank. Clearly not to rant about him and shubman just to check up on his good friend.

..........................

Ishan

Pspspsss

Mayank

Stop with that pspspss

I'm not a cat.

Ishan

That's my way to get fast replies from you

Mayank

What's so important??

I know you there's more.

Did you tell him?

Couldn't take it so i left

we make out

Title: chapter 19
Chapter_Text:
"There's no milk tea! is this what we walked 30 minute for?" Shubman is pissed after reading the menu.

"I told you that weird guy was no use" shubman scoffs throwing the menu onto the table.

"He said the same thing about you" ishan mumbles to himself.

"Nothing's good let's get out of here" shubman gets up to leave.

"You see that ice cream truck" shubman points at a ice cream truck parked 200m away "let's race to that"

Ishan looks at the truck then at shubman, he runs before they could count to three and start the race. Shubman sprint after him in a split eventually overtaking him.

Shubman reached the truck first beating ishan by a second.

"A cheater and a loser" shubman says panting.

"You don't have quick reflexe" ishan continues inhaling the oxygen in "and i didn't lose you got big legs it's a impartial race to begin with!"

"Everything is fair in love and race" the corner of shubman's lips turns into a lazy smirk.

"This is betrayal" ishan groans.

"Stop being so cute!" Shubman murmurs his hand going up to curl around ishan's nape before bringing him closer to kiss his cheek.

"What flavor you want ishh?" He asks pulling back.

Ishan does not reply he just looks shubman dead in eyes giving him the look of 'are you seriously asking that right now?'

"Chocolate it is" shubman chokes out.

Ishan puts his phone back into his pocket taking the icecream cup from shubman's hand "we should head back now, siraj bhaiya texted they're having a sleep over in rahul bhaiya's room"

They started walking back to their car while ishan eats his ice cream with the little spoon and shubman walks with one hand around ishan's shoulder other holding a hazel nut icecream cone.

..........☆☆☆........

Ishan changed into his orange shorts and white tshirt while shubman is still busy ruffling through his bag.

"Just wear anything we're not going to a party for fuck sake" ishan throws his slipper at shubman.

"Still needs to look decent" he tries to dodge it but still got hit by it on his chest.

"Decent for a sleepover?? You're not even being reasonable right now!" Ishan got up wearing his slipper back.

"Here!" He takes out a black short from shubman's bag and and a black matching tshirt from his own bag "you better change into them in two minutes"

.

.

Ishan walks ahead first trying to reach rahul bhaiya's room as soon as he can.

They stand inside the elevator facing the mirror, ishan fixes his hair running his fingers through them. On the other hand shubman can't help but stare- stare on how nicely the shorts sit on ishan's lower back.

"You're staring" ishan breathes, a teasing tone in his voice, looking at back at shubman through the mirror.

"I know."

"Why? Is there something?"

"Yeah let me get that for you" shubman leans forward placing his hand over ishan's ass feeling the curve up and down twice. "There all good."

"Such a gentleman, what would i do without you?" Ishan sighs dramatically.

"I should be the one saying that" shubman says scrunching his nose.

"You know what? i agree." Ishan nods his head.

"Hey" shubman glasses.

"What? I'm right without me you would probably be laying somewhere in the dark corners of your room. Dead by lack of fashion sense" the elevator door opened and ishan makes a run for his life after saying that.

"Come here you lil shit" shubman runs after him.

.

.

The door to kl's room burst open, comes in ishan running.

"Virat bhaiya save me!" He jumps on virat.

"Geez you're strangling me" virat says recovering from the shock of someone jumping on him.

Before ishan can get off virat, a very breathless shubman enters the room. "How did you manage to run so fast!"

"Him! Save me from him!" Ishan holds virat tightly.

"What happened?" Virat asks.

"He said i have a terrible fashion sense if it weren't for him" shubman shouts.

"That's not what i said!" Ishan shouts back "i just said you lack fashion sense and i help you where you lack" he pouts.

"He didn't lie though" virat mumbles.

"Not you too bhaiya, I'm hurt" shubman cries dramatically.

"Okay okay enough with the drama go take your seats now" rohit says.

"I'll sit with virat bhaiya" ishan says following virat to the sofa.

"No I'll sit with virat bhaiya, he took your side earlier it's my turn now" shubman push ishan to the side taking the seat beside virat.

Before ishan could sit on the other side Jaiswal came and sat there with a smile "i was sitting there"

"When did you become so popular among the youngsters?" Rohit asks.

"I always was" virat winks.

"Come here ishu" Shreyas calls ishan to lay with him on the bed.

Ishan jumps next to him while he pulls him in for cuddles.

"Tired?" Shreyas asks.

"Very much" ishan sighs

"Let's call Rishabh" Shreyas take out his phone to video chat rishabh.

"Ohh i miss rishu bhaiya" ishan says getting excited.

"Look Who's calling after a whole week that too while lying in other man's arm" rishabh says the first thing after answering the call in 3rd ring.

"I thought you hated me bothering you everyday...my my don't tell me you've already fallen for me? I appreciate it though but i don't think I'm ready for another extra marital affair" ishan teases.

"Not ready? How much more do i have to wait?" Rishabh tease back "and here i was thinking a second marriage would be a nice idea"

"Marriage? Do i get a ring?" Ishan asks subtly glancing at shubman, smirking after seeing the latter is starting right back at him.

"My fingers are empty though" he says wiggling his fingers in front of the camera.

"What do you want name it. Gold? Platinum? Diamond?" Rishabh questions with his playful voice.

"Your cheap ass would buy him a fake diamond" sheryas comments laughing.

"Like I'd ever let him wear anything fake" shubman says plopping next to ishan, he can taste the bitterness of his words as he pulls ishan out of Shreyas hold wrapping his hands around him.

"Well ishu doesn't need a diamond he's a diamond himself" rishabh shrugs winking at ishan.

"Just say you don't wanna buy me one" ishan continues to tease, gulping while keeping a smile on hie face as shubman draws little circles with his thumb over his hips.

"I'm telling you there's no better match for you other than me" shubman whispers next to ishan's ear pressing the thumb harder into his hips.

"You were trying to kill me just minutes ago" ishan's eyes scrunched.

"It is just me or these two looks like seconds away from fucking? Right in front of us" rohit says pointing at shubman and ishan.

"This feels like a plot of badly written porn" siraj whines "and we're the live audience"

"Think about me I'm laying right next to them!" Shreyas cries.

"Can you two not? I just want to have have my drink without feeling like i want to throw up" tilak says rolling his eyes.

"We're just joking and teasing" shubman says sounding innocent.

"Yeah nice joke now get off each other" bumrah scoffs.

"I'm married for years and yet they make me feel single" virat shakes his head "you seems like you're enjoying the show yash" he comments when his eyes land on Jaiswal.

..........end for today..........

.

.

.

.

.

Title: chapter 20
Chapter_Text:
"What are you doing?"

Ishan looked back to shubman standing by the door.

"Just looking at the sky" ishan says turning his head back.

"The sky is empty there's no moon tonight" shubman says coming behind him pulling him against his chest. "I was looking for you in rahul bhaiya's room when i woke up alone"

"Oh were you?" Ishan asked closing his eyes.

"You should've woken me up if you wanted to sleep in our room" shubman murmurs holding ishan for the warmth feeling the cold breeze hit his skin.

Ishan rubbed his fingers against the glass railing, he squhis eyes close, mind bothered again as mayank's words flow back into his ear from that call.

"So how was it?" Mayank speaks from the other side.

Ishan close the balcony door as silently as he can, it's still night everyone had fallen asleep an hour ago some on bed some on extra mattresses. He was laying on the mattress scrolling reels when mayank's call came.

"It was good" he let out a breath finally.

"Did he said it was a date?" Mayank asks getting a bit excited.

"Hah N-no" ishan lets out a dry chuckle.

"Did you said you wanted it to be a date?" Mayank questioned again.

"Well..." ishan sighs not knowing what to say.

"So you did not and he didn't either what are you doing ishan. Is this how you want it go? Make things clear yeah?" Mayank continues "when did it started?"

"When we were playing against Australia t20i in kerala" ishan whines.

"Ohh...i-i heard from abhishek he had a fight with sara before he flew to meet you did he tell you that?" Mayank asks with little concern in his voice.

"N-no I'm getting to know that from you" ishan whispers.

"He might have not come only for you....ishu just don't end up being a backup or a rebound"

"Ish?"

He blinked looking back to see shubman frowning at him "where are you lost? In stars?"

Ishan lightly takes shubman's hands and remove them from around his waist. He might have held onto shubman's hands longer than necessary.

Ishan can already picture the look of confusing and sadness on shubman's face.

He slowly turns around to face shubman. God should he really have the talk right now, he's second guessing himself.

"Why did you fought with sara? Is this the reason why you came to karala?" There he said it.

"W-what?" Shubman's voice is guff and shaky "what are you saying-"

ishan inhales sharply before saying "You're making it more difficult than it has to be just reply to my question simply"

Shubman's dosen't budge the silence follows.

"Alright then if you don't wanna answer that, answer this what are we shubman, what are we to you?" Ishan's voice is void of any emotions.

"We're...best friends" shubman says, voice not above a whisper.

"No" ishan shakes his head "best friends doesn't make out at any given moment, and you know how i feel for you"

"I saw the messages she's begging for you to come back, What are you gonna do now huh? Keep making out with your best friend or go back to her?" Ishan laughs humorlessly. The words feel and sound awkward coming out of his own mouth.

"You're asking me to choose?" shubman mumbled looking down.

Ishan eyes widen with a poignant sense of hurt the fire in his eyes fading out until only disappointment remains. For a brief moment he looks like he can't what he's hearing.

"Are you seriously asking me that?" His voice quivering. "Of course I'm asking you to fucking choose. In fact, I shouldn't even have to ask, are you planning to fool around with two people?"

"You don't think it's possible to love two people--" shubman paused.

Ishan freezes for a moment. The damage shubman's words did to him is unmistakable, visibly engraving itself across his face in a harrowing display of pain. "It is possible. But this- this is not for me, it's either her or me or i want nothing. So make the choice"

"Huh..so the choice is made" ishan says after a whole minute of silence. He wants to laugh and cry at the same time.

"Ish wait- shit sorry, wait a second let me-" shubman was cut off my ishan who have reached the door now.

"Let's end it right here, i don't think i can continue anymore, and as for our friendship let's take a break from each other for how long i don't know but i need that for myself" ishan says before exiting the Door.

He didn't turn back to see if shubman followed him or not.

Ishan had to let the words out, his heart was too heavy to keep going. He wiped his eyes as he entered the elevator.

Everything was swirling in his mind, ishan was glad but they should've had this talk sooner. He's too far gone but he couldn't hold it anymore not after today.

He just wants to run away but to where? Somehow he ended up at the terrace.

He can see, in front of his eyes their friendship falling apart and he was the reason, there's no way they're going back to being best friends after all that, he can't even blame shubman because he himself let everything happen. The pain of losing that special bond and the guilt of knowing the reason was him, made it unbearable. More tears come down his eyes.

.

.

Ishan feels a bright light hit his face, he tries to open his eyes but the light is too much. Slowly he's managed to open his eyes, he look up to see sun hitting right at his face. He had fallen asleep sitting on this chair, so shubman really didn't come after him. He lets out a huff making his way downstairs.

He stands in front of rohit's room taking a deep breath before knocking.

"Why are you knocking at 7AM?" A just woken up rohit opens the door. "And what's with your eyes?"

"Nothing just couldn't sleep last night" ishan says shaking it off. "I have something to ask that's why I'm here bhaiya"

"Alright come in" rohit says opening the door for him.

"I just wanted to ask" ishan looks up rohit into the eyes "will they ever let me play for any test match?"

"No. Not until someone gets injured or drop out" rohit replies looking away.

"Well Alright then this is all i wanted to know" ishan got up "I'll be heading out now"

He reached the front desk, taking a car key in desperate need to run out of this place.

.

.

.

The car came to an stop in front of a park ishan did not got out rather he sit inside trying to keep his breathe stable.

He took his phone out calling hardik's number, the call got answered on 2nd ring.

"Hey ishu-" hardik stops when he heard sniffles. "what happened? Are you crying?"

"T-they are seeing me as a substitute player only bhaiya" ishan sobbed. "I might not even get to play in any test match"

"There can be two things done, one you drop out and come back, two you stay there in hopes of getting a chance" hardik whispers gently.

"I don't want to be here anymore" ishan shook his head.

"Then tell the management you're dropping out" hardik continues "and go pack your bags I'll book your tickets for today"

Ishan cut the call and wiped his tears for the nth time today finally getting his eyes cleaned, he typed a mail to bcci hitting the send and throwing his phone on passenger seat.

Ishan was tired too tired all of a sudden. But somehow relieved. The hope died, leaving behind a corpse of him who felt numb to everything.

He lost hope the moment when he realised there was no future for him in this tese series.

He lost tow things he loves the most today two things that does not hold any future for him right now.

He knows there's no hope with shubman either. He stopped hoping for it too. He would never fall for that dream and illusion again.

............end for today...........

.

.

.

.

.
