Title: chapter 21
Chapter_Text:
Go play: 'tune jo na kaha' from new York on spotify before reading.

.............

Ishan tries to straighten his back as he leans back on his seat that he had been sitting on for past 15 hours and still one more hour until they land in Mumbai.

He turn off airplane mode on his phone to inform hardik that his flight will be landing in one hour.

The instant regret hit him, his phone started ringing non stop since the news of him dropping out is public now.

The notifications came like a flood.

'what happened?'

'I'm sorry to hear that'

'work on your mental health and come back stronger'

'it's going to be okay'

Reading them makes his eyes sting with unnecessary tears. Tears of realisation, they made the announcement and let him go just like that.

Still the most disappointing thing of all is not seeing a single text from shubman.

The last time ishan saw shubman was when he walked out of their room, and when he went back in to pack his stuff shubman wasn't there, he was thankful as he would not have to face shubman bow. But somewhere disappointed too he wants to see him for the last time before leaving.

Now he refuse to think about shubman.

Shubman who did nothing when he walked out, shubman who didn't even send him a text or a call.

A tear dropped on his hand, he's crying without even knowing. He wiped his eyes with the back of hands, he's done being pathetic, he forces the tears back fighting them, not wanting to cry on a airplane.

...........☆☆☆........

Ishan reached his apartment by 8 PM, he jumped on his bed ready to fall asleep without changing his clothes. But he quickly got woken up by door bell ringing.

"Finally, i have been ringing the bell for past 5 minutes" ishan heard hardik complain when he open the door.

"You have the pass code bhaiya, you could have open it yourself" ishan whines.

"I forgot the last digit" Hardik let out a embarrassing sigh coming inside as he ruffles ishan's hair.

"Did you had dinner?" Hardik aske going to fridge to pull out a bottle of water.

"No" ishan mumbles looking back at hardik.

"Good then i bought some take out"  hardik says taking out the plates "it's fried chicken what drink do you want with it? Beer? Whiskey? Wine? or champagne?

"You don't even eat chicken" ishan looked at him with surprise.

"Well yeah chicken is for you i got some snacks for me" hardik replies. "Now tell me what do you want to drink let's go full unhealthy today"

"Whiskey with carbonated water" ishan chuckles.

Ishan took a sip of his drink after eating 3 pieces of fried chicken because hardik didn't let him drink empty stomach.

He plans to get drunk and have a good sleep without thinking about the hangover, that's the problem for future ishan not him.

He took the very first sip and the taste of alcohol reminds him of shubman. His eyes are feeling wet again. The sudden memory of shubman kissing him when they're both drunk came.

"Your mouth is so rotten go wash it shub" ishan scoffs pushing shubman off of him. "Stop being nasty"

"Just one more baby" shubman whisper as he brushed the stray hair off of ishan's face, gently caressing the latter's cheeks, before he leaned in and placed a soft kiss on ishan's lips. And then kissing him again biting his lips this time.

"What not disgusted anymore?" Shubman asks teasing ishan, as he goes to kiss his neck now, making ishan roll his eyes.

ishan can smell the alcohol and can taste it yet it doesn't bother him at all, but he won't admit it out loud.

"I am very much disgusted" ishan says averting shubman's gaze, looking away blushing, flushing more red.

"If not your mouth, then I'll have to eat your neck up" shubman says dramatically, burying his face at the crook of ishan neck, now blushing as well.

"Ishu?"

"Huh?" Ishan blink back his tears coming back to reality when hardik called his name.

Hardik pulls the glass out of his hand putting it on table before pulling him into a hug "let it out"

Ishan let those pitiful and unwanted tears fall from his eyes resting his head on hardik's shoulder. While hardik gently pats his back.

His shoulders shakes sobs are coming out, ishan had been refusing to give himself privilege to cry properly for past 24 hours now that he got a shoulder to cry on he's letting it out.

.

.

.

"You can have that now" hardik points at the whiskey glass placed in front of ishan as he hands ishan some tissues.

"I'd rather not" ishan chuckles.

"I think you should take a vacation ishu, yk for a week have fun with your friends before going back to practicing" hardik suggests.

"Yeah i-" ishan was cut off by a ding.

It was hardik's phone which he picked up to check.

Ishan peeked in to see what it was. He saw a text from natasa asking hardik when he will be back.

"You can go bhaiya, you see I'm fine now" ishan says before hardik can type a reply.

"You sure?" Hardik looked special.

"Yeah I'll go to sleep now" ishan assures him.

"Then go to bed I'll leave when I'm sure you've fallen asleep" hardik says leaning back at the sofa.

"I swear I'll go to sleep" ishan laughs a bit "don't be like my father"

Title: chapter 22
Chapter_Text:
The door closed with a loud bang, leaving shubman standing there alone in the balcony.

He doesn't even know for how long he stands there and watches the closed door, as if he wanted to open it and bring ishan back to him.

All he knows no matter how hard he tries he just can't seem to run after ishan.

Shubman sinks down on his feet right on top of the cold floor, and sits with his back against glass railing with his eyes still focused on the door that closed behind ishan.

Shame.

Guit.

Regret.

Pain.

Everything bad just came crashing in at shubman, crushing him whole.

'You can never have him.You don't deserve him.'  he's hearing voices in his head.

The tears come out burning him in his own regret. Shubman let's out a sniffle when he realises he drove ishan away.

Shubman knows he should have never given in to his inner longings,  he should have known his limits, should have never hoped for more, should have stopped himself from taking more than he's allowed to take. Should have never kissed ishan.

But how can he have not given in when for the past six years he was dying to have a kiss, just a kiss and when he finally had the taste he couldn't stop himself.

Six years of waiting, dreaming- six years of just staring at ishan, admiring him from afar, acting like a fool to get his attention to see him smile.

***past***

Shubman doesn't remember how it all started, maybe it started when he liked the way his name came out of ishan's lips for the very first time.

'Shubman, nice to meet you.'

Ishan's voice was deep yetbit huskymaking shubman's name sound like a mantra, a mantra that had him warped around ishan with nowhere to escape not like he wants to escape.

Maybe it was when, he started to sneak into ishan's room every night.

'Just for tonight please, you know i cannot fall asleep alone.'

'That's the last time I'm letting you sleep here.'

It wasn't the last time Shubman make sure there was never a last time.

Or Maybe it was when ishan started calling him baby, darling, honey, meri jaan, babe all sorts of names making his heart go crazy.

'Goodmorning baby'

'Goodnight darling come here let's sleep'

The best mornings and nights alwayshad ishan calling him sweet names.

Or when be started making excuses to have alone time with ishan. Taking him on long drives at night, making reservation for him and ishan only then making up a lie about how he's on a budget that's why it's only them.

'Let's sneak out, the party is boring anyways'

'Where are we going?'

'Anywhere, just you and me'

The realisation hit shubman when ishan introduced mayank as his best friend, he had been friends with maynak prior to that but something change that day.

The way mayank called ishan 'sweetheart' shubman tries to ignore it and carry on the conversation but then mayank's hand would grab ishan whenever he laughed, shubman burned holes into mayank that day with his eyes because all he can do is watch as mayank rubs ishan's shoulders right in front of him.

It wasn't normal to feel this jealous over your best friend shubman knows it's not platonic at all.

Shubman doesn't mind it though, as long as nobody knows he can live with that. Beside shubman knows how to keep a secret.

.

.

.

But things doesn't always go as planned specially if it's planned by shubman.

In front of him stands the person coming out as bisexual.

The same person whom he's been in love for six years.

The same person who's responsible for all his unspoken fears.

The person he can never reach.

His dream.

His everything.

Each word falling out of ishan's lips. Those damn lips he always wants to kiss now, telling him how he had never kissed a guy.

Despite being drunk that night. He still remember everything, all the little details of those kisses. He could still hear ishan's breathless moans ringing inside his head.

There are numerous signs if someone is romantically interested in you. Shubman never acknowledge it before, but after that makeout session in the bathroom he came to realise how oblivious he had been To not notice anything at all.

There's so many things like how ishan's eyes change whenever he looks at shubman those shy glances. Getting salty when shubman isn't giving him attention, randomly holding hands, stealing few kisses on shubman's cheeks.

Is he reading it all wrong? Then again he can't let himself be overwhelmed.

And the most difficult part is shubman actually wants to go out of his way to see if the feelings are mutual.

.

.

.

It doesn't take much time for shubman to find good looking girls Who's ready to throw themself at him.

Truth to be told shubman had no idea how he ended up with her on the dancefloor. It's as if he blacked out and went with the very first girl he saw.

Call him petty, but he likes the way ishan is eyeing him and this random girl in his hold, ishan looks like a predator ready to jump out of his seat and tear them apart.

Shubman feels like he's certainly living the dream.

'Come on now, just come snd snatch me away'shubman thinks shyly grinning as he hold the girl closer all while feeling ishan's intense gaze on him.

The girl started to lean closer to his lips. Shubman starts to feel giddy waiting for ishan come and stop her. He counts in his head already expecting ishan to pull him away before she could kiss him.

He snaps out when felt her kissing the corner of his lips, he sure is living a dream but a tortures one because there's no sign of ishan coming towards him, and he just let some random girl kiss him.

Shubman jolts out of dancefloor speed walking towards where ishan was sitting before just to find the seat empty now. It wasn't until 30 minutes later when virat came and told him ishan went back to hotel.

He starts to feel a bit lightheaded, he can feel the fuzz from all the alcohol he drank. And he still managed to see how ishan is trying to dodge the questions about 'why he left' he's looking anywhere but him.

Shubman is having far too much fun with. This is why he lifts up ishan's chin, he's amused at the fact that ishan can't seem to hold eye contact for longer than few seconds, gaze drifting away to focus something over shubman's shoulder. 'Well I'll get my answer if you kiss me back'shubman mummers going in for a kiss.

This may have been his best decision in life to finally have something he craved for years.

But it turns out to be the worst because he's not allowed to take decisions it's the PR team who makes the call in his life and they for sure doesn't want this.

.........end for today........

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

Title: chapter 23
Chapter_Text:
Shubman didn't know how long he had been sitting on that balcony floor. When He jolts back to reality. A reality where he knows his life will never be the same again.

Is it too late to run after Ishan now?

No. He can't let that happen, he just can't let Ishan go.

He looks up at the closed door while wiping his eyes with the back of his hands before sprinting out of the room.

Shubman walks into the lobby hoping to find Ishan in one of the team member's rooms but gets his hopes crushed one by one.

At last, he walks towards Rohit's door and knocks.

"B-Bhaiya have you seen Ishan?" Shubman asks.

"Yeah, he came to ask me something 10 minutes ago and left, did something happen with you two? How come you don't know about his whereabouts?" Rohit questioned, wondering why both of them were coming knocking on his door one after another.

"N-no nothing...I'll go look for him" Shubman says rushing towards the elevator.

After not finding Ishan anywhere in the hotel Shubman went out to look at any familiar place they went to in this town anywhere he could go.

After driving around for hours Shubman decides to call Ishan and that's when he sees, the news of Ishan dropping out due to mental fatigue notifications popping up from gc everyone asking why nobody was informed about this

His heartbeat started hammering deep inside his chest and the sound of it scared him in ways he didn't even think were possible. Shubman's eyes are still stuck on the phone screen.

He swallowed down another wave of tears didn't want to make his eyes blurry as he drove back to the hotel.

.

.

.

.

.

Shubman lets out a pained sigh as he opens the door to their room just to find it empty.

He quickly noticed how there were only his bags left by the wardrobe. It felt like another stab at him. Making him let out an ironic laugh that soon turned into sobbing.

It had been inevitable, hadn't it?

He couldn't do anything, couldn't find Ishan, couldn't make him stop, couldn't tell him the truth--

Shubman remembered the beginning of this and, he knew exactly when it all started when he was doomed.

It was the day he saw that proposal from his management on a random morning in August 2021. there was no stopping it, he had known it deep down since the beginning.

The plan was simple, get involved with someone famous and give people something to talk about, A good PR for both the parties involved.

They told him to write down every slightest famous girl he was friends and Acquaintances with, and he did as told.

A few days later he got a text from them telling him how Sara Tendulkar might be the best option as she's connected with cricket also.

Shubman remembers meeting Sara for the First time at the age of 15.

The first few meetings were awkward he had so much respect for her father that made him think twice before saying anything, Gradually he became more comfortable and somehow developed a friendship with her that turned into a tiny crush.

They would flirt here and there but it all died down when she left for London for her MSC degree.

Somehow Abhishek got to know about all that and started teasing him, Shubman would get annoyed at the beginning but he stopped getting bothered by his best friend's constant teasing.

He heard from a friend that she returned to Mumbai last month but he hasn't reached out to her nor did she.

.

.

.

.

.

Shubman hated situations that were not under his control and out of his comfort zone, he hated texting people first, but now his PR Team is negging him constantly to reach out to Sara and go somewhere where they could be photographed easily.

So he did, he did reach out to her and she was surprisingly excited to meet him again after exchanging texts for weeks they finally met.

Shubman didn't know the exact moment was when that tiny crush faded, but he realised it now. It wasn't a moment, an hour, an exact date, time or place, it went away with her when she left because he does not feel anything for her as he look at her now, nor did he missed her when she was gone even for a single day.

Shubman raised his head to take a good look at her, she's a bit chubby now her hair shorter than before she looked a bit cute there as she sat in front of him deep into talking and reminding him of the old days.

The outing with her didn't get much attention from the public at the beginning so he'll have to continue with commenting on her posts playing push and pull games in her DMs. And people did start to notice they started leaving comments on her posts. He knows she already has something going on with a guy named Siddhartha but as long as he's not being the reason for their split he could work with that.

But the real blow was when he hung out with Sara Ali Khan. It was just a friendly get-together for them and people turned that into something else to fit their love triangle narrative.

That's when they got the whole nation's attention on them everyone talking About them, their names were trending on Twitter.

The teasing came back from Abhishek soon his team started it too then the whole stadium started shouting her name at every match, their fans and following grew.

Shubman loved the attention however it was getting tiresome, he didn't know how long he could keep this up, he wants to be known for his game, not for his relationships.

He got lost, too deep into all this he thought it would make him happy, and it did worked but not in a way he wanted it to be.

Not after he had the taste of happiness with Ishan, had the taste of him that made Shubman feel the sudden excitement and desire.

After the World Cup, he decides to end it for good when he keeps receiving texts from Sara asking him to meet up so he does he flies back to Mumbai.

They decided to meet in his apartment as the World Cup just ended and he didn't want to create a scandal or bring more attention to himself.

"Wow you look handsome even with messy hair" Sara blurted as soon as he opened the door.

"I didn't expected to get reviews on my look at this hour" Shulman says staring at her dumbfounded.

"How are you feeling after the World Cup?" She asks sitting on the couch.

"Overwhelmed" Shubman replies without glancing in her direction "What would you like to have? Coffee? Or something else?"

"Got any ginger ale?" She asks.

"No, but there's diet coke" Shubman comes back and hands her a can of diet coke.

Sara chuckles "Saw some edits of you and Ishan everyone in the comment section thinks you both are gay for each other" She tries to break the awkward silence. But soon realised she made it even more awkward.

Title: chapter 24
Chapter_Text:
Disappointed is not the word for what Shubman feels, it's more like grief, mourning for his chances to explain. He's bouncing back and forth between denial and sadness, with bouts of anger and heart-crushing moments of acceptance.

Pinning is one thing, he's been doing it for years it's almost like second nature, but not actively having Ishan in his life is horrible, and impossible too given that they practically share every moment.

Shubman knows what suffering feels like.He's feeling it every day when he wakes up and realises all over again that Ishan is gone after finding his side of the bed empty. When he gets ready for practice all by himself or when he spends the rest of his day cooped up by himself.

He feels it whenever he goes to sleep at night hugging a pillow, it's a habit Ishan left for him to deal with.

He knows what suffering feels like, Ishan made him feel it every day in his absence.

Homesickness that's what it is, he had dealt with it before and probably will again in future too. This time though it's harder than ever.

Shubman worries every time he sees the response he got to his text from Ishan, and they haven't talked after that shubman doesn't know how to respond or what to say. He practically had to press his ears closer when any team member was on the phone with Ishan just to see if he was okay.

Shubman keeps thinking about what Ishan might be doing, is he off to somewhere having fun or worse if he's lying in a bed all gloomy like him?

More often than not he finds himself thinking everything will be over once he goes back to India.

The absolute worst part is he can't seem to focus on the game he has been performing badly in practice and he's terrified about the actual game.

..........☆☆☆........

He fucked up.

Shubman knew when he saw Rohit running towards him for a run and he stayed standing there which resulted in Rohit getting out at 0.

The silence of the crowd is agitating. Shubman tries to keep himself calm as he walks back to the dressing room with his head hanging low. After getting out on just 23 runs.

He knows what is coming for him, after years he's used to it. the trolling not only from the internet but from his team members also.

Shubman sees Virat standing right next to him. He tries to give a weak smile even if it feels like dying.

Virat, standing to his right, eyes him for a second and places a hand on his shoulder while turning to look the other way. It should be reassuring, especially for Shubman who is always looking for physical affection. But today it is a reminder of a silent 'I know, I know kid'  and it makes him want to curl on the floor and cry.

He's not as strong as Virat, he's not sure if he's gonna make it out of this stadium without crumbling into pieces.

.

.

.

.

.

Shubman sits on the edge of the bed his mind replaying all the bad things that had happened in just a few days and to deal with it all he only needed one person to be with him.

It's only in those moments when he understands the drug addicts and the alcohol addicts, he understands why they need to bury themselves in alcohol or drugs. He understands it all because he himself feels addicted to someone.

Shubman knew his life would be a mess from the get-go. But he realised now how he didn't know when he got lost going so deep into the thorns However today he also realised how much he wanted to find his way back and wanted to feel happy again. Shubman didn't know how, or where to begin all he knew was that he felt a sudden feeling of urgency in his chest and a desire to run away from the thorns back to his home. He wanted to go home so bad.

In what seemed like hours he managed to type out a text and with trembling fingers, he hit the send button.

Shubman curled in the bed there he stayed staring at the screen waiting for a reply unaware of the passing time and his rapid heartbeat.

........☆☆☆......

Ishan's gaze remained fixated on the glass of rum that Mayank had carefully poured for him as if it held all the answers to his problems. Lost in his memories, he barely registered the encouraging words that Mayank was offering him, 'You'll get better,' 'It's gonna be okay,' 'You'll forget him.' These words seemed hollow and meaningless, like false promises that friends feel obligated to make in times of crisis. Despite the reassurances, Ishan couldn't shake off the feeling of despair and heartbreak that had taken hold of him.

It's been weeks and Ishan is trying his best. When Mayank reached out to him to hang out, he decided to go with the hope of enjoying himself. They talked about various things, and he did manage to have some fun. However, as the night progressed and he had a glass of wine, he found himself sinking back into his gloomy state of mind. That's when Ishan pitched the idea of going back to his apartment and having some drinks and Mayank went with it.

Mayank patted Ishan's head compassionately everything was calm until Ishan finished his 4th glass that's when the tantrums came.

"Let me get some water for you" Mayank sighs as he takes Ishan's head off his shoulder pushing him back a bit.

Ishan's head falls graciously on the back pillow. He was mumbling something quietly under his breath while keeping his eyes closed and a serene look on his face.

With one last look, Mayank walked to the kitchen only to come back to the sight of Ishan sitting on the floor with his back pressed against the sofa and a black flip-flop in his arms.

"What in the" Mayank runs towards Ishan "Why in the world you're hugging a slipper"

Ishan looks up to see Mayank bending down next to him. He eyes mayank for a few seconds before bursting into crying "I bought them for Shubman" Ishan manages to say between his loud cries.

"And why do you have them here" Mayank can't help but ask.

"I found them here," Ishan says, his voice tinged with a hint of sadness, as he points his finger under the sofa, "He used to steal my slippers and try to squeeze his feet into them. So I bought him matching ones" he says with a bittersweet chuckle, reminiscing the memories.

"Then let's get rid of them if they remind you of him and make you sad" Mayank says taking the flip-flop out of Ishan's hand and throwing it across the room.

"Hey! That's Balenciaga!" Ishan made a noise of protest.

"Come on Let's restore your dehydration level there's only alcohol in your body and it's getting to your head now" Mayank says as he pours a glass of water.

"Here drink up baby" Before he could hand the glass over. Ishan is on his shoulder and the loud cries are back.

"What now I can't even call you baby? Even that reminds you of him?" Mayank tries to complain but it's no use Ishan just keeps mumbling god knows what.

"Okay okay calm down" Mayank pets Ishan's back trying to calm him down "You don't want to drink water that's okay perhaps you wanna eat something?"

"I want maggi" In a swift motion Ishan is off his shoulder with no tears in his eyes anymore.

"Um...Alright, I'll go make some" Mayank says every word carefully not wanting to have a crying Ishan on his shoulder once again.

After 15 minutes of searching the whole pantry, Mayank is standing in front of Ishan having no idea how to break the news to him that they're out of maggi or any other noodles in particular.

Title: chapter 25
Chapter_Text:
Ishan didn't notice when his friend walked in with coffee. He rather seems lost in thought barely paying attention to his surroundings. He's absentmindedly looking at the phone screen in his hand and that isn't until Mayank clears his throat rather loudly that Ishan raises his head he looks confused for a moment.

"How many times have you read that 'can we talk?' Text?" Mayank observes motioning to the device in his hand.

Ishan opens his mouth to respond but Mayank raises his hand and jerks his head to the side saying "Wait I don't even want to know"

"You're so fucking annoying" Ishan rolls his eyes.

"What a coincidence I get the same feeling for you" Mayank says with a fake smile on his face.

"And here I thought you were in love with me" Ishan huffs.

Ishan stares as Mayank slowly walks over to the bed where he's sitting. His lips curved into a pleasant smile that quickly dropped when he felt a bonk on his head.

"Why the fuck-" Ishan cries.

"Let me get that alcohol out of your head you're still drunk" Mayank tries to shush him holding his head in place ready to hit again.

"I'll fucking punch you if you hit me again" Ishan snaps.

Maynak backed a bit before having the last hit and ran shouting "Get out of bed first loser!"

Provoked Ishan tries to get out of bed with a big step but to his unfortunate luck his feet get tangled in the blanket making him fall face first with a thud.

Mayank stops to look back at what had happened.

"Serves you right" He can't help but laugh at the sight of his best friend groaning on the floor.

But the fall did not stop Ishan from getting up and running after Mayank now even more angry.

.

.

.

.

.

The room falls silent after the fistfight with Ishan having the last hit.

"You know Ishan I think you should go and have a talk with him" Mayank mutters breaking the silence as he takes the seat beside Ishan.

"Why do you think so?" Ishan questions confused at the way Mayank started this series talk out of nowhere.

"Communication is the key?" Mayank pauses to think a bit "Well communication is the key until manipulation comes and it becomes the lock which keeps you locked in"

Ishan Presses his lips into a thin line. "What if I get locked?"

"Then come talk to me I know what's best for you" Mayank pulls Ishan into a tight hug.

"Are you sure you're not in love with me?" Ishan tease.

Mayank scoffs before pushing Ishan back to inspect his head. "Was it my punch or the fall that took a hard blow on your head?"

"Come on not even a little bit?" Ishan teased again.

"Whatever it was I think it broke you" Mayank stands up "Grab your stuff we're going to the physiotherapist it's getting serious now."

"It's neurologists who do brain checkups, not a physiotherapist you dumb fuck" Ishan argues.

"Still you fall with your whole body let's visit a physiotherapist first" Mayank replies trying to defend himself.

.........☆☆☆.......

Even with his best efforts in trying to escape the physiotherapist Ishan sits in the clinic with mew found shoulder swelling and back pain waiting for Maynak to be finished with his checkup as well.

He stayed seated in the waiting room for a good 20 minutes until he felt a tap on his shoulder.

"You remember me right?" A guy with a bright smile speaks as Ishan looks up from his phone screen.

"Of course, I do Abhishek" With a hesitant smile Ishan replies.

"Here for the regular checkup?" Abhishek asks smile never leaving his face.

"No" Ishan chuckled "It's a bit embarrassing but I fell down the bed this morning"

"Bet it was Shubman who pushed you" Abhishek says with confidence.

That was when Ishan got to know about how Abhishek had no idea What went down. And maybe Abhishek and Shubman aren't as close now as they used to be, and maybe he's the reason behind it.

"No, I got tangled and fell" Ishan sighs "Anyways how have you been Abhishek?"

"I've been doing good, I think we should hang maybe go out for a drink or something it's been so long since I last met you" Abhishek says taking his phone out and handing it to Ishan.

Ishan looks at him in confusion "Your number?" Abhishek speaks.

"Ohh" Ishan nodded as he took the phone and quickly typed in his number.

"Alrighty sees you man I'm kinda in a hurry" Abhishek says before giving Ishan a side hug and leaving.

"Guess did I just bumped into" Ishan says when Mayank walks in minutes later.

"Who?"

"Abhishek"

"Abhishek as in Shubman's best friend?" Mayank asked deadpanned earning a glare from Ishan.

"I mean his other best friend" he tries to correct his mistake but the glaring just gets intense.

"H-his friend" he sighs finally getting the right term.

........☆☆☆.......

Ishan grimaces as soon as they walk into the club, the unfamiliar scents and the smell of sweat all mixed make his nose twitch in disgust.

A week had passed since he met Abhishek in the clinic he had been receiving texts from him here and there.

Ishan walks behind Mayank and Abhishek as they cut through the crowd. It was Mayank who asked him for a club night which he couldn't say no to.

"What do you want to drink?" Maynak asks as they take the seat in the empty corner.

"Anything that could get me over that smell" Ishan whines.

Mayank does not even respond to Ishan's whines instead he looks around to scanning the crowd for something or rather someone.

Only two drinks in Ishan's eyes are trying to find something familiar. A few minutes later Ishan's gaze is drawn to a woman standing a few feet away from him with her friends. She's wearing that grey bodycon dress that hugs her body in all the right places that deep neckline shows her cleavage nicely leaving no room for imagination. But all those factors aren't the reason why Ishan can't take his eyes off her he's not even into boobs to begin with. It's the dimples that appear on her cheeks with the slightest movement of her lips that's what got him hooked.

Unbidden Ishan thinks about Shubman, if he were right here now he would have ordered the most unfamiliar drink to try on and then whine and shit-talk about that drink if it didn't suited his taste buds. He would have those dimples appearing on his face when Ishan would offer him his drink instead.

Title: chapter 26
Chapter_Text:
"He's not interested you can leave"

Everyone turned their heads to see who spoke.

"Oh hi shub-" Abhishek says walking towards Shubman to greet him.

Mayank let out a small 'ohh' before pulling Abhishek to the bar. "Let's go get some drinks buddy"

"Wait when did we become buddies?" Abhishek whispers bit confused.

"Just now. Let's go come on" Mayank says while dragging Abhishek by the arm, Leaving Ishan standing alone there.

"You can leave" Shubman says to the girl giving her one last look.

Ishan reminds silence taking a drink from a nearby counter. Every time Ishan has ever felt strongly emotional about something or someone, his first instinct has always been to run as far as he can. But today he waited to face what was coming, he waited for a whole 16 seconds, and he counted each burning second before that someone came to stand in front of him.

"Ish I know you don't want to talk but, please let me explain myself" Shubman says bringing Ishan out of his thoughts.

"Always so stubborn" Ishan scoffs putting the now empty glass on the table.

"Ish- please, let me explain everything" shubman whispers.

"And what exactly is this 'everything'?" Ishan sniffles, blinking away the tears that brim in his eyes.

Shubman sighs, nervously gulping, "Everything. Every secret I kept from you, every mistake I made, every lie I ever told you. I had my reasons for that."

"And you plan to explain your reasons in a club full of people?" Ishan notices the hesitation Shubman shows to make any move. "Let's go somewhere private" With slightly trembling feet Ishan walks towards the exit, leaving Shubman to follow after him.

.

.

.

.

"Ishan, well... firstly... I'm sorry." Shubman fidgets with the hem of the jacket trying to hold it while the wind tries its best to make it fly.

Ishan raised his eyebrow at him as if challenging him to go into details. "What for?"

"For not acting up on time and not stopping you. Only if I had explained to you everything back on our hotel balcony everything would've been so much easier." Shubman says his gaze fixed on Ishan.

Ishan notices the vulnerability that swims in those words the genuine guilt, the shame. "Then why didn't you do that?" He asks.

"You know how hard it is to make a name for yourself don't you?" Shubman says feeling his tears streaming down his face. "I don't love her, there's nothing between me and Sara. I was just doing what my PR told me to do."

"Who are you trying to fool here? Shubman, you do love her, for years you have" Ishan says tasting the bitterness of his own words as soon as they leave his mouth.

Shubman shakes his head "It was never love, it was just a crush I only liked her-"

"Liked her enough to chose her."

"I did not! I want you, ish, please! If you just let me explain-"

"You wanted me? You are just spitting lies in my face right now. If you had truly wanted me back, then you would've fucking stop me and called off that stupid relationship you had with her" Ishan snaps "You don't want me and you never did."

"It's not like that I swear. Of course, I'd choose you over her any day you're my best friend how could I not?" Shubman pleaded, trying to make Ishan listen to him. But Ishan wanted nothing of it though.

"And yet you didn't. This thing between us" Ishan motioned with his hand between him and Shubman "Was a mistake on your part which I have to suffer every day because of, I know what I feel for you and I know that you will never go beyond that best friend phase because I also know that you never felt the same for me"

"Baby please don't turn me away i can't-" Shubman pleads.

"It won't work like that Shubman" Ishan felt his knees grow weak and he couldn't breathe but still somehow he managed to walk away.

And just like that Shubman is left standing on the rooftop all alone.

.

.

.

.

.

"Can somebody explain to me why we're drinking at different tables, when we all could be drinking together" Abhishek nags, hands on his waist, as he scrolls Shubman who is sitting and drinking alone despite them being under the same roof.

"I... have no idea" Shubman just sighed. He has no idea how he even got down to the club and when his legs dragged him to this table.

"Here's your pineapple juice Abhishek, and no you cannot mix vodka you are already pretty down-" Mayank paused, glancing at Shubman who was downing his nth drink. "Where's Ishan?"

"He left" Shubman replied without looking up from his glass.

"And you didn't go after him?" Mayank scoffs noticing how Shubman kept his silence.

"What is going on Shub?" Abhishek took the glass out of Shubman's hand. "Is this about Sara? Did you two argue? Or something big? Just spill it man we wanna help you"

"Sara?" Shubman chuckled "I'm done with her. She probably fucked things up more for me, I could've had a chance if she didn't-- huh who am I kidding? It's all because of me, I messed up again and now he probably won't even want to see me" he mumbles quietly as he begins to tear up.

"He? Who's he?" Abhishek asks as he exchanges a confused look with Mayank.

"He? He's mine, I mean he was mine- sort of... my ish--" Before Shubman could finish he was cut off by Mayank.

"I think he's too drunk and is saying whatever comes to his mind letting his intrusive thoughts win" Mayank grumbled, stopping Shubman from saying whatever he was about to say in a room full of people.

"Last time I let my intrusive thoughts win, I impulsively kissed my best friend and he has been ghosting me for weeks now" Shubman says brushing his tears away, ruefully laughing to himself.

'What the hell is this guy thinking?' Mayank thinks to himself in disbelief.

"We never kissed what are you talking about? And you know I'm always just a call away you're the one Who's ghosting me" a very confused Abhishek spoke.

"Guess you're equally drunk" Mayank whispers while patting Abhishek's back. "Let's get you home buddy would you please wait in the parking while I get Shubman?" With a small node, Abhishek left.

"And I'm guessing you have no plans for leaving this place tonight do you?" Mayank turns to Shubman Who's now shaking his head in a no.

"Well, I don't care you're leaving with us" Mayank chided.

"And why should I?" Shubman asks absentmindedly.

"If Ishan left without you and you're not following him that only means one thing, you haven't fixed fucking anything and I would not let my best friend go to sleep while crying, so you better go and fix everything up" Mayank complains in a stage whisper feeling both irritated and impatient.

"I hurt him once, and I hurt him once again just earlier today. He won't listen to me. If you have seen his face you'd blame me as well, might even have thrown hands" Shubman mutters feeling himself break even more.

Mayank sighs, rubbing soothing circles on Shubman's back. "That I still wanna do... but have you told him everything? Just be your stubborn self and go explain to him."

"Should I?"

"Yeah, you should."

"What if he kicks me out?"

"Then it's on you I'm not coming to pick you up."

"I know you will."

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

............☆☆☆.........

Title: chapter 27
Chapter_Text:
Shubman takes a deep breath as he stands outside Ishan's door. He's familiar with the place enough to just press in the passcode and enter without knocking like he used to do before but he knows he has no right to do that anymore he runs a hand in his hair in frustration.

Shubman squeezes his eyes shut before he quickly reaches out and presses the doorbell, He stands his ground suppressing the urge to just run away it's not a game of ringing the doorbells and running away this is something more serious. Shubman flinches when he hears a loud thud followed by cursing coming from inside, there's some shuffling before the sound of feet padding on the floor grows louder and louder.

Then he hears the click of the door before it swings open, revealing a very furious Ishan "Who-"

Ishan cut himself off eyes, widening when they met Shubman's on the other side of the door. Ishan blinks as Shubman stares, completely frozen in his spot.

"Why are you here?" Ishan asks breaking the silence. "If you're here to go through it all over again then don't even bother"

"I'm... I just had f-few drinks- I mean I got drunk and now I don't remember my way back home" Shubman shuffles on his feet flushing with embarrassment and hoping Ishan doesn't catch on his lie.

Ishan frowns his eyebrows "And what does that have to do with me? Open Google Maps and follow the directions"

"I don't remember the passcode either" Shubman gave him a quick look.

"Call your manager? Ask for a key or something?" Ishan argues.

"Just let me stay the night?" Shubman begs "For old time's sake?"

"For old time's sake" Ishan scoffs.

Shubman nodes, he steps in and shuts the door behind him before following Ishan into the living room.

"What were you doing before I came?" Shubman asks noticing how the stuff from the coffee table is knocked down on the floor.

"Oh it just fell down with me"

"What?"

"I got scared by the doorbell, I'm sure you've heard the thud"

"Are you serious?" Shubman blinks.

"You think I'm joking right now? While having this on my forehead?" Ishan asks raising his eyes while pointing at the top of his forehead.

Shubman's eyes moved up to Ishan's forehead which had bruises and a tiny bump. Shubman shakes his head in disbelief "You're so fucking dumb" he says while marching into the kitchen. He makes his way back to Ishan with ice wrapped in a towel.

"Here press this against the bump" Shubman says reaching out to give Ishan the ice, only to get his hand swatted away in return.

"It'll swell even more ish" Shubman whines trying to press the ice on Ishan's forehead.

"Don't touch it" ishan hisses.

"Alright then enjoy being ugly for 3 days with a big ass bump on your forehead" Shubman snaps.

Ishan turns to look at him, thinking hard before agreeing "Fine, but be gentle."

Shubman nods reaching out to press the ice when Ishan shifts next to him. Shubman tries not to stare at Ishan's neck, tries not to dwell on how the marks he left have disappeared completely without a trace, they would've it's been so long. He leans closer, looking into Ishan's eyes. It's been so long is all Shubman can think about, he wants to touch, he wants to wrap his arms around Ishan's body, he wants to kiss him badly and tell him how much he loves him.

"I miss you" Shubman whispers creasing Ishan's cheekbone with his thumb.

"Shubman" Ishan warns, voice strained and desperate.

"Ish" Shubman tries again "I miss you."

Swiftly, Ishan holds Shubman's hand taking it off his face. "Don't say shit when you don't mean it" he blurts out moving away.

Shubman's heart drops to his stomach. Does Ishan think he's lying? He doesn't want him to think like that.

"I think you should go, book a Hotel or go to someone else" Ishan says getting up from the couch.

Shubman walks up to Ishan, he wraps his hands around Ishan's waist and gives a small desperate hug.

"Stop it" Ishan whips his head around to look at him.

"Baby, please," Shubman pleaded with desperation in his voice. "You can yell at me, be angry with me, or do whatever you want with me, Just please don't turn me away. I can't..." he rested his forehead on Ishan's shoulder, his voice breaking. "I can't spend a day without you, I can't do it without you. Please, I'm begging you. Give me a chance to be honest for once."

"For months we had this life- this world where it was just the two of us, just you and me. You have already invaded every facet of life, and left your traces everywhere. In my room, in my bed, in my closet- half of it is filled with your clothes only. You have always been more than a friend to me." Shubman laments, lifting his head only to see Ishan's eyes on him. "And I miss you, I miss seeing you in my bed, I miss walking up next to you, I miss getting ready with you, I miss having practice sessions where you'd be practising right next to me, I miss sharing every meal with you, I miss you every single passing minutes when I can't see you next to me" he muttered, feeling his emotions welling up inside him. "I truly meant everything I said." He felt himself breaking even more as he finally expressed what had been troubling him for so long.

"N-no.... no you don't- stop... I don't want to hear it" Ishan says shaking his head. He's done waiting, he's tired of playing that push and pull.

"You know how important cricket is to me....take it away and I'm nothing" Shubman says in a heavy take of breath as he cups Ishan's face. "I did everything to make a name for myself, be it by my performance or my affairs-" his voice breaks "When you asked me to choose I stayed silent because it wasn't about you or her it was about you or my cricket career. You know the society we live in Ishan, it was the fear of losing you or cricket that made me silent. And I know you can feel this fear too."

Ishan wanted to say something. He wanted to ask Shubman to stop talking. He wanted to leave, but he couldn't. The moment Shubman looked into his eyes. Ishan felt his knees grow weak. Shubman is just too impossible to resist but can Ishan put his career on line? Whatever they have is it really enough for him to take the risk? Maybe. Maybe not.

"I'm tired of getting hurt Shubman. So if you're still not sure how you wanna continue this then please... let's just stop this. I mean you're not even sure how you feel about me-"

"I know how I feel" Shubman whispers "Ishan I... I love you" There he said it. He has thought of about what could be the worst. 'Taking the risk with Ishan' or 'completely losing him' and from there Shubman knew the answer, Nothing could be worse for him than losing Ishan. He's still holding Ishan and Ishan is just looking at him with an unreadable expression on his face.

They're both standing still as if they're frozen in time. Without blinking Shubman kept his eyes on Ishan still "I love you" he said again with confidence in his voice.

"D-do you really?" Ishan asks, voice low like a whisper.

"I really, really love you so much. Sometimes I think I can't even breathe, it's too overwhelming, how you make my heart beat faster for you, how you take my breath away just by a mare smile, how you make my inside warm just by looking at me." Shubman says pausing as he leans in pressing their forehead together. "You're everything I want ish, not her or anyone just you... every day for the past 6 years, it has always been you."

Title: chapter 28
Chapter_Text:
🔞

NSFW!!

NOT SAFE FOR MINORS!!

MINORS DO NOT INTERACT!!

YOU'LL GO TO JAIL!!

IT'S A SWITCH FF!!

I don't know more warning.

.............

It is the kind of February night that makes you feel the cold, no matter how many layers of clothes cover your skin. The cold gets into the bones. But that is for the Mumbaikars. Shubman is used to it, he's been chilling the whole evening lying in bed together. Ishan looks like the definition of comfort, wearing his extra-large t-shirt (that he stole from Shubman) and loose shorts. His outgrown black hair creates a mess on his head, and Shubman can't help but find himself running his fingers through Ishan's hair. And it's perfect, relaxing into each other's presence and physical contact until Ishan tilts his head and trails his hand cupping Shubman's cheek as they kiss, letting out the low groans of pleasure. Hands are wandering all over the place, caressing, grabbing, kneading, feeling, and exploring each other's anatomy. Until Ishan moves to take Shubman's shirt off.

Shubman rolls them over just as his shirt reaches the floor, caging Ishan under him, fitting his right leg between Ishan's. Grinding down and earning a low moan. Hands trailing up to his nape and pulling his hair, angling his face down so he can kiss all over his neck. Ishan is sensitive, there's no denying it. Shubman takes his time there, kissing the mole on Ishan's neck over and over again. Maybe he's a little possessive, perhaps he just likes to tease. Ishan wouldn't know his reasons, but he doesn't complain. And when Shubman bites him there, that's when he gets out of the bliss and whispers "shit babe."

"What? Want me to go slow? Wait Let me take off your t-shirt first" Shubman says, reaching out for the t-shirt, but he gets stopped by Ishan.

"Not now. I'm already getting late for the gym." Ishan says, and Shubman's eyes widen in disbelief.

"Don't you dare ish" Shubman whines, grabbing Ishan by the thigh before he can escape. But he didn't hold Ishan too tightly, and Ishan gets to free himself.

"Meri jaan, I'll be back in 3 hours," Ishan says between his giggles.

"You think calling me 'meri jaan' will make it bearable?" Shubman sighs.

Rolling his eyes, Ishan walks to the bathroom without saying anything.

"Hey! Wait up! Let's go together!" Shubman exclaims, chasing behind Ishan.

"Ugh! Seriously. Now I can't even shower with you around" Ishan complains.

"I'm already half-naked! Why not just go together?" Shubman questions as he moves to shrug off his jeans, trying to get them off quickly.

"Keep trying," Ishan goes inside, closing the door and leaving Shubman almost naked by the bathroom door.

There goes his ego. Groaning internally, he lets his jeans pool around his ankle as he walks the walk of shame back. Embarrassingly enough, he kicks them off eventually.

"I can't believe you" Shubman sighs when he sees Ishan coming out of the bathroom just in a towel with water running down his body. "You're such a tease" he mumbles, laying back on the bed and closing his eyes.

"And you love me for it," Ishan teased more.

"Can't you just skip today's session?" Shubman groans, frustrated.

Ishan pays him no mind as if his ears have been plugged with cotton. Silently Putting on his favourite orange t-shirt.

"Tell them you got a stomachache or something" Shubman tries again. "Everyone gets sick."

"If I do that, Hardik bhaiya will come skipping his session to check on me" Ishan warns. "I bet you won't like getting interrupted by none other than Hardik bhaiya."

"Then how about five more minutes in bed?"

Ishan blinked and hissed. Five more minutes in bed does sound amazing.

"Sounds tempting, no?"

"I'm already pretty late." Without any more thoughts, Ishan grabs his bag.

"Don't leave me like that, you heartless human being" Shubman sits up, "or else you'll find me on YouTube under some sad song commenting how the love of my life left me for the gym. Think about how it'll taint your name with all the backlash."

Ishan stops by the door hearing Shubman rant. He groans, eyeing the time on his phone. But still runs back to the bed, he grabs the back of Shubman's head, pulling him in for a kiss. He needs to taste those lips one last time, that might help him go through 3 hours of hard work.

"Pick me up when I'm done," Ishan says against Shubman's lips. Lips that are a little too addictive to be able to pull away so easily, but unfortunately, he has to leave and pull away. "Be there at seven." He jogs back to the door.

_____________

Shubman is late.

Fuck, he's so very late.

It was well into the evening, almost 7:19 when he opened his eyes from a deep sleep. Shubman is ready to make the run, except he still needs to put some clothes on first. He almost screams in frustration while trying to find the clothes he threw earlier into the unknown corner. After walking back and forth twice already, he gives up and pulls out the first thing he sees after opening the closet.

Shubman manages to get there in 10 minutes he spots Ishan sitting on the stairs next to the parking lift, scrolling his phone. He then thanked every existing God for the fact that Ishan waited and didn't just decide to walk back.

Shubman runs a hand through his hair as he stands in front of Ishan. He moves, stalling, almost anxious. "Sorry, I'm late."

"Of course you are," Ishan says, stomping his feet towards the car.

Shubman gets into the driver's seat following Ishan, "I fell asleep" he whispers with an apologetic look on his face, He lets out a sigh when Ishan keeps his silence.

"Hey, buckle up Ish" Shubman waited for a few seconds before leaning onto his side and fastening up Ishan's seatbelt himself.

''Come on," Shubman whines not moving back, "I already apologized."

"Will you promise to give me a foot massage when we get home?" Ishan says, feeling a little tingle of excitement.

"Fine, I promise" Shubman leans in to place a whisper-soft kiss against Ishan's lips before pulling back to his seat.

"Where are we going?" Ishan said, trying to sound casual when he saw Shubman taking a U-turn out of nowhere.

"Let's take a walk by the sea," Shubman said casually.

"Alright," Ishan nods and glances out of the window, the sun is already set.

They spent the rest of the car ride just chatting idly. Minutes later, Shubman wheeled into the parking lot.

Title: chapter 29
Chapter_Text:
Ishan woke up the next morning. He raised himself slightly to look around, only to find himself alone in bed.

With half-closed eyes, Ishan got up and went hunting for his phone, God knows where he threw it last night. After looking for it for minutes, Ishan finally locates it, buried in the pile of clothes that consists of both his and Shubman's clothes. He scrolls through the call log only to see missed calls from Mayank from last night.

Ishan decides to call back, and the call is answered instantly. "What is it?"

"This is how you greet your best friend in the whole world?" Mayank pretends to be offended.

"I just woke up. My brain can’t process phone calls right now. Stop being a crybaby," Ishan explains.

"I'm not a crybaby, geez! I'm just annoyed because it seems like you forgot about me," Mayank says with a dramatic sigh.

"How can one forget someone as annoying as you?" Ishan mutters.

"Did you call me just to insult me?" Mayank yelled out.

"If that's Mayank, tell him we're on our way" Shubman said, coming out of the bathroom right after taking a shower, "and tell him I'm not gonna let him hijack you."

"Alright, we're on our way" Ishan ends the call, saving his ass from being yelled at by doing so.

"Did he call you too?" Ishan asks.

"He said he's at your place, so I told him to wait there." Shubman hums. "Should we get going or make him wait."

“Too hard to decide” Ishan mutters thoughtfully, still frowning as if he’s thinking really hard.

"I'll make it easy for you" Shubman runs towards Ishan, tackling him onto the bed.

"Hey, go away, you're still wet" Ishan said as he playfully punched Shubman's chest, trying to move him away.

"Always wet for-" Shubman gets cut off by Ishan.

"Don't even try to finish it," Ishan said quickly.

Shubman laughs and tries to hug Ishan closer to him, but there’s already no space between them. He squeezes his fingers into the thick of Ishan's thigh, just holding him. Ishan relaxed his head on Shubman's shoulder, wrapping his hands tightly around him.

"Seriously, you're planning to sleep again? No goodnight kiss last night, now no good morning kisses" Shubman mumbles in a pout.

"You're such a baby," Ishan said, opening his eyes slightly and planting a kiss on Shubman's cheek, then his whole face, and the last one on his lips. Ishan pulled back and gazed down at him. "Enough kisses now?" Shubman grinned and shook his head, indicating he wanted more.

"We're totally gonna make him wait" Ishan leaned down and pressed a soft kiss to his lips.

____________

The elevator to their apartment complex pings, and the doors open. Ishan and Shubman walk hand in hand down the hallway towards their unit. The smile soon disappeared as they stood in front of the door to their apartment waiting for either of them to put the pin in.

"Come on, just do it" Ishan says, breaking the silence.

"No way, you do it" Shubman puts his hands back into his pockets.

"Why? Are you scared?" Ishan teases.

"Yes," Shubman admits, swallowing to moisten his dry throat. "Yes, I am."

"Stop being such a wimp" Ishan said, shrugging and glancing at Shubman. "It's not like a flying punch will land on your face as soon as you open the door."

Shubman frowned, "You know damn well that's what gonna happen."

"Come on, it can't be that bad," Ishan said with a sigh. "Go in first, or no kisses for you."

"You can't be serious right now that's not fair" Shubman protested before stopping short at the sight of Ishan's straight face, waiting for him to go inside.

Shubman slowly turns, 'I can do this. No more running away' he thinks to himself while also complaining to God how unfair his life is. With trembling fingers, he opened the door and stepped inside. "Hey--" he started to say and then stopped, his breath catching in his throat.

Mayank was sitting on the sofa, grinning at him. "Hey," he said casually.

Ishan shuts the door behind him, letting his bag fall from his shoulder, his eyes wander around, taking in how no one is on the floor or shouting at each other.

Mayank got up from the sofa and walked up to him. Ishan's hands reaches out to the closest thing they could find, which is Shubman's neck. His arms looped around Shubman's neck, swaying him to the ground. "Save me shubi" he screamed as they fell.

Shubman had almost died right there from the sudden shock of someone throwing him to the ground by the neck.

"What is wrong with you two?" Mayank questions in pure confusion.

"Get away from my boyfriend, you psycho" Shubman says, coming back to his senses.

"I can't even hug my best friend?" Mayank said, looking impatient.

"He's playing mind games now" Ishan said, leaching onto Shubman like a koala. "It's even worse."

"Me?" Mayank rolled his eyes. "You two are the ones who are acting like you're hallucinating a ghost or something."

"Hey! No need to bring a ghost in" Ishan chirped. "We're sorry, okay."

"Yeah, no need to talk about ghosts, we're the ones who sleep here alone at night" Shubman says, getting defensive.

"If you both are sleeping together, then how are you alone?" Mayank asks.

"Let's just say we both get scared" Ishan replies.

Mayank glanced between the two of them. "I'm not even surprised. Now can you two stop acting weird and get up?"

"Not before you forgive us for making you wait." Both Ishan and Shubman speak in sync.

"I'm not even mad to begin with" Mayank said, giving them a puzzled look.

"You're telling us you didn't plan 10 different ways to torture and then kill us for the past 3 hours, we had you waiting?" Ishan said, sounding concerned.

"No, I didn't I would've given it a thought if I was alone" Mayank said.

"What do you mean if you were alone?" Ishan asks.

"I told you there are ghosts in this house baby, we need to move out--" Shubman stops when he sees Mayank turning his head to the side and following his gaze.

There stands Abhishek by the kitchen with a glass of water in his hand and waves with the other hand, a concerned look on his face.

.

.

.

.

.

Shubman was in the kitchen with Abhishek, making Ishan's coffee. It was taking him an inordinate amount of time to make a single iced americano he was in a bit of a daze, wandering all over the place, having to remind himself what he was in the middle of doing.

Title: The End
Chapter_Text:
NSFW (after about like 5,000 words)

_______

Shubman fights his instincts to throw everything into the suitcase. He has to fight it hard as he folds the clothes as neatly as he can and puts them in the bag. Of course, he's a responsible adult he must do his best to pack his boyfriend's bag.

The IPL season is about to start. Shubman was excited to travel with Ishan for their first match. Until his manager told him that he still had a work schedule in Mumbai for the next 2 days. He feels annoyed that there's only one time he'll get to be with Ishan this whole season, and on top of that, he gets two fewer days.

Still, he won't say he hates the IPL.

Shubman loves it.

He really does.

Take him back a few years ago when he was an anxious 19-year-old boy, unsure if he could even make a place for himself in a franchise. Now he's 24 years old, captain of the Gujarat Titans, and still a bit anxious to some level but managing it well. These 5 years have truly changed his life. His cheeks are sore with the amount of proud smiling he's done just thinking about it. And he can't forget about the beautiful man beside him, Ishan. Rather than finding Ishan next to him, he finds him standing by the bathroom door, staring at Shubman with an intensity that borders on obsession.

"Did you fall asleep again in the bath?" Shubman's voice sounds borderline amused, teasing to the edges.

"I am not the one who can't stand in the shower for more than 10 minutes," Ishan says, getting into his black jeans.

"Standing underwater for a long time makes my skin feel itchy, I don't like it" Shubman complains while looking for a shirt for Ishan.

"Whiny baby," Ishan says. "Find me something comfortable."

Shubman laughs his laugh airy and light like the sound of bells on a warm spring evening. "You're the baby out of two of us."

"No, I am not" Ishan gapes at him.

"You are," Shubman says as he lets his eyes travel from Ishan's wet nestled hair to his toes. "You're the babiest of them all," he confidently says.

Ishan knows he is losing the argument, but he isn't one to take defeat lying down. So, he does the only thing he can think of at the moment: he shakes his head repeatedly, sending water flying all over Shubman, and both boys dissolve into fits of laughter.

You just proved my point, you're a baby." Shubman taunts and pulls a black shirt out and holds it over Ishan's shoulders, waiting for him to pull his hands through the sleeves. Then Shubman takes his black onyx pendant off his neck and circles it around Ishan's neck, doing up the clasp.

"You sure?" Ishan asks.

"Yeah, I love it on you" Shubman fiddles with the pendant until it sits perfectly between Ishan's 'Trust Your Struggle' tattoo.

"God, this tattoo of yours is so fucking sexy" Shubman whispers lowly.

"Can you button up my shirt now?" Ishan speaks, more like a question.

"Be silent for a bit," Shubman commands as he trails his fingers over the ink, eyes transfixed on the skin.

"Take a picture it'll last longer," Ishan says frustrated, feeling a bit too hot.

"brilliant" Shubman takes his phone out and proceeds to take pictures of Ishan's chest from 5 different angles.

10 minutes later, they stand in the Shubman stop at the threshold and lean on the door with his shoulder.

"Don't miss me too much" Shubman grins at him, slipping an arm around his waist, pulling Ishan closer.

"It's hard not to" Ishan reassures him, kissing his cheek.

"You're exaggerating."

"Am not," Ishan says, giving him a shy smile.

"Yeah, I will be till then," Shubman smiles back at him, so big that those beautiful dimples make an appearance and his eyes turn into crescents, filled with mirth. "You're allowed to have fun without me."

"Alright, Mom," Ishan says, unable to help from grinning.

"Ugh, as if calling me bro wasn't already enough," Shubman says, swatting him on the arm.

"But you're the only bro I'd kiss." Ishan leans towards him. Their lips meet in a deep, sensual kiss, Shubman slipping his tongue inside Ishan's mouth, eliciting the softest of whimpers from him. But he pulls back before things can get too heated between them.

"Then I don't mind being called bro," Shubman whispers against his lips. "I am insatiable of you, darling."

.

.

.

.

.

.

The bus ride to the hotel is pretty silent. Until the coach starts a monologue, Ishan stares, pretends he's listening, and nods when needed but doesn't really pay attention.

When the coach is done talking, Ishan tells Hardik that he will be heading to his room to take a nap. The jetlag is starting to get him.

Ishan dragged himself to the reception to collect his key, realising he would have had to sit around if he waited for the management to hand them their keys.

"Hey, I'm here to collect my key," Ishan says abruptly, startling the receptionist who has a cup of coffee in his hand, hovering near his lips as he's about to take a sip. "It's booked under the name of Is-"

"I know you," the receptionist says, placing the cup back on the table. She looks a little surprised at first, but she quickly masks her expression. "I mean, I've seen you... on the TV." She shuffles a few keys on her computer.

She smiles widely, revealing a row of straight white teeth, and her eyes form into crescents. "Here's your key, sir" she says, handing the keycard to Ishan.

"You're actually the first one who came to collect the key in person," she says, making small talk.

Ishan laughs. "There's actually a team briefing going on, and I'm tired of waiting around."

Before Ishan can thank her, he sees the girl in front of him pointing at the coffee she was drinking earlier. "Would you like some coffee to feel better?"

Ishan blinks, clearly caught off guard, because why would he want that coffee? "Um, thank you but I don't like hot beverages, and definitely not someone else's coffee."

The receptionist smiles before shaking her head. "I wasn't offering you my coffee. I meant to send room service."

"No thank you" Ishan says and bids goodbye.

Ishan glances at his phone. It's just past 8:30 am. The lobby is slightly quieter, but he knows his teammate will be coming out anytime. It feels weird to be the first one and wait for everyone else. Well, he didn't have anything else to do. He couldn't sleep and didn't want to just lie in his bed, so he preferred to wait here and go through all the random pictures Shubman had sent him.
